title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Walk by Faith

- Maximize Opportunity

- Give Freely

- Train Daily

- Do What You Say



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

Solid experience editing video ads — e-commerce or DTC experience is a big plus



Comfortable using AI tools to speed up your workflow — things like AI voiceovers, background removal, auto-captioning, or AI-assisted motion graphics



You understand what makes someone stop scrolling — hooks, pacing, and storytelling matter to you



Fast, reliable, and self-directed — you don't need your hand held to deliver great work



Can handle volume — we test a lot of creative and need consistent output, not just occasional great videos



A portfolio or reel showing real ad work (not just brand films or passion projects)



Nice to have

Experience with Meta ad creative specifically (knowing aspect ratios, text limits, hook best practices)



Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills



You've worked with UGC creators before and know how to make raw footage look great



How to apply

Send us your portfolio or reel along with a short note about your experience with paid ad creative. Compensation and more details about the role will be discussed on the call.



To show us you read this entire post, please include the word "EDITOR" at the top of your application message. Applications without it will not be considered.

title: Billing Support Administrator
description:
Role Overview



As a Billing Support Administrator, you are the first point of contact for our customers and the go-to for the team’s support needs. You will manage the flow of communication, ensure our databases remain the “source of truth,” and provide critical administrative backing to our team of Billing Specialists.



Key Responsibilities



 & Triage 

• Monitor and maintain the main billing inbox.

• Tag
s with property identifiers and assign complex requests to the correct specialist.

• Respond directly to customer inquiries and provide copies of invoices or statements.

Data Integrity 

• Update
 and address data across multiple systems when customers request.

• Document all changes and communications in the database to ensure a clear audit trail.

Compliance & Setup 

• Complete vendor setup documentation for new clients.

• Coordinate with insurance companies to obtain updated COIs (Certificates of Insurance).

Client Relations 

• Act as the first point of contact for the billing phone extension.

• Resolve general inquiries and transfer complex calls to the appropriate tea
mber.

Process & Quality 

• Perform monthly report reviews to ensure data accuracy.

• Assist the team in updating and refining SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures).



Who You Are

• A Master of Multitasking: You can switch from updating a database to answering a phone call without losing your place.

• Detail Specific: You understand that in billing, a “small” mistake can lead to an avalanche of problems, so you double-check everything.

• Tech-Savvy: You are comfortable navigating multiple software systems simultaneously.

• A Clear Communicator: You can explain billing nuances to customers with empathy and professionalism.

• Customer Satisfaction Oriented: Ensuring the customer is receiving timely responses that answer all of their inquiries without multiple back and forth.



Qualifications & Skills

• 1–3 years of experience in an administrative or customer support role.

• Strong organizational skills and experience managing high-volume inboxes, phone lines, and internal requests.

• Preferred but not required: experience with QuickBooks, NetSuite, and Salesforce.



How to Apply?

Submit your CV and Voice Recording Introduction.

Also webcam/laptop camera is required for this role.

title: Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Freelance, Part-Time or Full-Time)
description:
Location: Remote



Compensation: $7–$11/hour (based on experience)



About the Role:

We are seeking a skilled Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer to join our team on a freelance, part-time, or full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise in fire alarm systems, security systems, CCTV, and access control. Projects will include system design, drafting, and documentation for submittals and installations.



Responsibilities:

- Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems in compliance with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local codes.

- Produce professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoDesk AutoCAD.

- Coordinate system layouts, device locations, riser diagrams, and wiring details.

- Collaborate with project managers, contractors, and AHJs as needed.

- Revise and update designs based on feedback or code requirements.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience designing fire alarm and/or low voltage security systems.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD (required).

- Familiarity with NFPA 72 and other relevant fire/life safety codes.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.

- Good communication skills and ability to work independently.



Preferred (not required):

- NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems or equivalent experience.

- Experience preparing full submittal packages for AHJ approval.

- Knowledge of manufacturer-specific equipment (e.g., Fire Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, etc.).



To Apply:

- Resume (required).

- Sample projects or work portfolio (preferred).

- Availability (freelance/part-time/full-time).

- Brief summary of relevant experience.

title: Experienced Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer (Remote)
description:
Experienced Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer (Remote)



Location: Remote

Compensation: $6–$10/hour (based on experience)



We are a fire & security contracting and engineering company seeking for  a skilled Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer to join our team on a freelance, part-time, or full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise in fire alarm systems, security systems, CCTV, and access control. Projects will include system design, drafting, and documentation for submittals and installations.



Key Responsibilities



- Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems in compliance with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local codes.

- Produce professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoDesk AutoCAD.

- Coordinate system layouts, device locations, riser diagrams, and wiring details.

- Collaborate with project managers, contractors, and AHJs as needed.

- Revise and update designs based on feedback or code requirements.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience designing fire alarm and/or low voltage security systems.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD (required).

- Familiarity with NFPA 72 and other relevant fire/life safety codes.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.

- Good communication skills and ability to work independently.



Preferred (not required):

- NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems or equivalent experience.

- Experience preparing full submittal packages for AHJ approval.

- Knowledge of manufacturer-specific equipment (e.g., Fire Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, etc.).



Position Details

-Flexible arrangement: freelance, part-time, or full-time

-Remote: work from anywhere

-Compensation: $6–$10/hour (based on experience and performance)

-Must be responsive and available to coordinate during business hours



Growth & Career Path



We’re building for the long term, and the right candidate will have the opportunity to grow with us:

-Potential to transition to a full-time or Engineering Lead role.

-Be part of a fast-growing, tech-enabled contracting & engineering company that values operational excellence and innovation.



Application Instructions (Read Carefully)



To apply, you must complete all the steps below:



1.) Write a short paragraph explaining why you are a good fit for this role.



2.) Answer this logic/comprehension question in 2–3 sentences:

:

          “Designer Application – [Your Name]”

           “I want to synergize with you”



5.) Submit a 2-minute video explaining your experience in fire alarm/security system design (portfolio samples encouraged).          

           **Upload via Google Drive or Loom and share the link.**

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer ( $4-$6/Hour + Commission )
description:
Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer



Job Type:

Remote | Part-Time or Full-Time

Base Pay + Commission + Growth Opportunity



About the Role



We are looking for an Inside Sales Associate to join our growing U.S.-based team, focused primarily on our Fire Alarm and Safety business.



This role is a strong fit for someone who wants to build a real future in sales. You will start by supporting lead generation, prospect research, lead organization, and follow-up coordination. As you gain experience, improve your communication, and prove your performance, you will be trained into Appointment Setting and may eventually grow into a Closer role.



This is not just a basic support position. It is a long-term opportunity for someone who is coachable, organized, strong in English, and serious about growing in sales.



Growth Path



This role is designed to develop over time:



>>Stage 1: Inside Sales Associate



>>Stage 2: Appointment Setter



>>Stage 3: Closer



We are looking for someone who is willing to learn step by step and grow with the company.



What You’ll Do



Your responsibilities will include:



>>>Researching potential clients online

>>>Building targeted lead lists

>>>Finding key decision-makers and accurate contact details

>>>Organizing and updating lead data in spreadsheets or CRM

>>>Supporting lead qualification based on company criteria

>>>Assisting with outreach preparation and follow-up tracking

>>>Helping maintain a clean and organized sales pipeline

>>>Supporting appointment-setting efforts as training progresses



As You Grow, You May Also Be Trained On



>Lead qualification

>Outreach follow-up

>Appointment setting

>Warm lead handling

>Early-stage sales conversations

>Supporting or eventually taking on closing responsibilities



Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:



>>Strong in written English

>>Good in spoken English

>>Organized and detail-oriented

>>Good at online research

>>Reliable and consistent

>>Able to follow systems and instructions

>>Coachable and willing to improve

>>Interested in building a long-term career in sales



Preferred but Not Required



>>Experience in lead generation

>>Experience in inside sales

>>Experience in appointment setting

>>Experience in B2B sales

>>Background in fire alarm, low voltage, construction, engineering, or technical services

>>Experience using CRM tools or lead tracking systems



Compensation



>>Base pay to start, depending on experience

>>Commission opportunities

>>Increased earning potential as responsibilities grow

>>Performance-based advancement



********Why Join Us*******



>Clear path for growth in sales

>Hands-on training and development

>Opportunity to work in a specialized U.S. service industry

>Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

>Performance-based promotion into bigger responsibilities



*****How to Apply****



To be considered, please send all of the following:



Your resume



A short voice recording introducing yourself in English



A 2-minute video recording explaining why you are a strong candidate for this position



A short written summary of your relevant experience



Your expected hourly rate



Your availability



Application Subject Line



Inside Sales Associate Application - [Your Name]



****Very Important!!****



Applications that do not include the voice recording and 2-minute video may not be prioritized.



> Screening Question



If you were asked to find companies that may need fire alarm and safety services, how would you identify the best leads and d
 which ones should be contacted first?

title: Online English Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Virtual Administrative Assistant – Schedules, Payroll, Appointments & Social Media Support
description:
We are a growing commercial cleaning company based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, seeking a reliable, organized, and proactive Virtual Administrative Assistant to handle daily administrative tasks and support our marketing team.

1+ year experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Admin Assistant (experience with calendars, reports, and client coordination is a big plus)

Excellent English communication skills (both written and spoken – you will be answering calls and writing professional
s)

Training and clear processes so you can hit the ground running

Opportunity to grow as the business grows



Please provide a 2 - 3 minute video explaining why you would be a good fit.

title: Real Estate Customer Service Representative (Direct Hire)
description:
KINDLY READ THE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY BEFORE YOU APPLY.



EJF Real Estate is a well-established, Property Management company based in the District of Columbia. We are looking for Customer Service Representatives who are responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



Job purpose:

Serve as the primary point of contact for EJF’s residents, owners, tenants, vendors, and any callers seeking assistance, addressing their questions, and resolving issues.



Roles and Responsibilities:

- First responder on the phone system.

- Answer phone calls and address callers' questions, investigate and resolve their issues, and document calls with clear, complete, and legible notes.

- Log calls in the system, create and update tickets as needed, and follow up with callers when necessary.

- First call resolution (billing inquiries, tenant ledgers, owner statement, and general questions).

- Create tickets for concerns/issues that cannot be resolved during the first call resolution.

- Assign unresolved cases to the appropriate party.

- Management of inbox and sorting mail received.

- Intake of concession requests, research reasons for request, draft concession addendum, submit internal request.

- Process pet requests and addendums.

- Pull utility bills and send them for processing.

- Update HOA fees in Appfolio when receiving notification from the condominium.

- Handle online reviews (troubleshoot, investigation, draft response, if issues have been resolved, ask reviewer to remove the review)

- Communicate effectively with tea
mbers and other departments, actively participate in departmental meetings, and request online reviews from callers.

- Meet departmental metrics, including average ring time, average handling time, a goal of at least 20 online reviews per week (4 per day), and a target of 0 abandoned calls, among other standards.



Desired Qualifications:

- College degree or equivalent work experience.

- Experience with Real Estate is a plus.

- Experience with CINC is a plus.

- At least 6 months of experience working remotely.

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent interpersonal skills, problem solving, and analytical skills.

- Strong customer service skills.

- Ability to multi-task and prioritize.

- Reliable and dependable.

- Excellent problem-solving skills.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure.

- Attention to details and highly organized.

- Great time management skills.

- Capable of keeping control of the call even when the customer is angry.

- Ethical and trustworthy.

- Great at relationship-building.

- Ability to work under minimal supervision.

- Friendly and fair.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work from 9 am to 5 pm EST.

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.

- Night shift – Office is in Washington DC under EST.

- Must be available to cover one of the three shifts available (EST: 8 am to 4:30 pm – 9 am to 5:30 pm – 9:30 am to 6 pm).

- The schedules are permanent and assigned by the department’s Manager. Schedules might change eventually depending on demand.

- Must have own work equipment that is not older than 2 years.

- Work equipment must be personal and not a family or shared computer/laptop.

- Internet speed must be no lower than 150 Mbps.

- Must have backup internet for emergencies (no lower than 100 Mbps) and a place to relocate during power or internet outages.



Compensation & Benefits:

- $6 USD per hour.

- PTO after 90 days of probationary period.

- HMO allowance after 90 days of probationary period.



How to apply:

1. Please check out website: 

2. Send an
 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour. (RATE IS NON-NEGOTIABLE).

4. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description.



Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Real Estate Customer Service - your name.



*Applicants who will apply through onlinejobs.ph will not be considered.

* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.

Looking forward to working with you!

title: FPA and M&A Associate
description:
About Us:

Profitability Partners is a distinguished fractional CFO business based in Tampa, Florida, specializing in delivering financial expertise to small and medium-sized businesses, e-commerce companies, and startups looking to exit. We are on the lookout for an experienced individual with a comprehensive background in M&A, FP&A and accounting. This remote, full-time opportunity is ideal for an overseas professional eager to take on a central role in our expansion, with opportunity to grow within the business.



Key Responsibilities:



Financial Modelling

• Build and construct three-statement, driver-based models, budgets, and 13-week cash flow forecasts.

• Run scenario/sensitivity analyses for pricing, hiring, capex, and capital allocation.

• Business Valuation Familiarity



Lead Exit-Readiness & M&A Support

• Prepare diligence-ready financials: EBITDA bridges, normalization adjustments, and working capital analyses.

• Assemble and maintain data rooms; create CIM/board-ready exhibits and KPI schedules.



Own Monthly Reporting & Board Materials

• Produce accrual-basis P&L, BS, CF with variance analysis and actionable commentary.

• Build concise “board style” decks in PowerPoint with trends, bridges, and forward views.

• Deliver flash reports for founders and investors.



Instrument & Analyze KPIs

• Define the metric architecture (definitions, calculations, owners, cadence).

• Build Excel-based dashboards for LTV/CAC, payback, retention/cohort analysis, product/channel margins, unit economics.

• Translate operational data (e-commerce, SaaS, marketplace, services) into financial impact.



Please Note: M&A experience (FDD/Transaction advisory, investment banking or other M&A experience is required).



Book keeping and full cycle accounting experience as well as Quickbooks familiarity is a strong plus.



This role will be full time and the expectation is that the role is your primary focus with no contracting/other roles done on the side.

Please do not apply if this profile does not suite your experience or desired work arrangement.



Qualifications:

. We are looking for someone who understands the importance of optimized product detail pages and how to help us win the digital shelf through best-in-class product content. The successful candidate will spend most of their time within the 
 Seller Central or Vendor Central portal, ensuring digital merchandising strategy is best in class. We are looking for someone with strong attention to detail and firm knowledge of how to create new product listings and variation families, upload digital content, and audit detail pages for accuracy. title: Mobile app developer
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION



We're looking for an experienced mobile app developer to build a professional event management app for EL TETEO — a Latin dance festival held in the Netherlands (
). The festival takes place 1–2 times per year (March and September) and attracts approximately 500 attendees per edition.

We need a polished, user-friendly mobile app available on both iOS and Android that serves as the central hub for our festival attendees  from browsing workshops and building personal schedules, to receiving real-time notifications and tracking shuttles.



We need to be able to add new informatin there for every new festival edition





PROJECT OVERVIEW



EL TETEO is a vibrant Latin dance festival featuring dozens of workshops, social dancing, performances, and more. Currently, attendees rely on printed schedules and manual communication. We want to bring the full festival experience into a mobile app that keeps everyone informed, organized, and engaged.

Design inspiration: Bueno app (
)  we love their clean UX and practical event-focused design.





???  KEY FEATURES REQUIRED  ???

????  1. Workshop Calendar & Agenda (Enhanced)

• Full overview of all workshops with times, instructors, locations, and descriptions

• Time-based filtering: only show current and upcoming workshops

• Participants can "follow" or register for workshops they want to attend

• Workshop notes section in card/frame format

• ? NEW: Detailed workshop descriptions — what participants will learn, skill level, what to bring

• ? NEW: Participant list per workshop — shows first and last names of enrolled attendees

• ? NEW: View other participants enrolled in the same workshop as you

• ? NEW: Instructor profiles with bio, photo, social media links

????  2. Personal Schedule & Notifications (Enhanced)

• Personal calendar/schedule built from selected workshops

• Push notification: "Your next workshop starts in X minutes"

• ? NEW: Smart conflict detection — warn if selected workshops overlap

????  3. Photo & Content Sharing (NEW)

• ? NEW: Photo upload functionality for attendees 
-style)

• ? NEW: Festival photo gallery/feed where all uploaded photos are visible

• ? NEW: Like and comment functionality on photos

• ? NEW: Social media integration — direct share to Instagram and TikTok

• ? NEW: Photo moderation tools for admins

????  4. Communication & Updates (NEW)

• ? NEW: News/Updates feed for pre-festival communication

• ? NEW: Practical info posts by organizers

• ? NEW: Push notifications for important updates and announcements

• ? NEW: Countdown timer to the next festival edition

?????  5. Navigation & Venue Information (NEW)

• ? NEW: Venue address with "Navigate to Venue" button ? opens Google Maps

• ? NEW: Hotel address with "Navigate to Hotel" button ? opens Google Maps

• ? NEW: Parking information and directions

• ? NEW: Interactive venue floor plan with rooms/stages

• ? NEW: Location markers for toilets, bar, coat check, first aid

• ? NEW: Food & drink menu with prices

• ? NEW: WiFi password and practical tips

????  6. Social & Community Features (NEW)

• ? NEW: "Find a Dance Partner" function — browse and match with attendees

• ? NEW: "Find a Roomie" function — share hotel rooms with preference matching

• ? NEW: Attendee profiles with dance styles, experience level, social links

• ? NEW: Optional in-app messaging between matched partners/roomies

????  7. Gamification & Rewards System (NEW)

• ? NEW: Points system — earn points for attending workshops, uploading photos, engaging

• ? NEW: Badges/achievements: "5 Workshops Attended", "Early Bird", "Social Butterfly"

• ? NEW: Leaderboard for most active participants

• ? NEW: SPECIAL: After X workshops ? early bird ticket popup for next festival

• ? NEW: Discounts and perks for loyal/returning visitors

????  8. Pre & Post Festival Engagement (NEW)

• ? NEW: Countdown timer with animated visuals

• ? NEW: Festival music playlist integration (Spotify / Apple Music)

• ? NEW: Instructor profiles with social media links

• ? NEW: Early bird ticket notifications

• ? NEW: Polls/voting for which instructors should come next year

• ? NEW: Post-festival feedback surveys and throwback gallery

????  9–15. Core V1 Features (Retained)

• Live shuttle tracking with real-time map

• Hotel checkout reminders

• Delay & schedule change notifications

• Demo video uploads (30-day post-event access)

• In-app voting function (enhanced with polls)

• Weeztix ticket integration

• User registration & profile management

???  ADMIN BACKEND PANEL (ENHANCED)  ???

Web-based admin dashboard with all V1 capabilities plus:

• ? NEW: Photo gallery moderation — approve/remove user-uploaded content

• ? NEW: News/Updates post creation and scheduling

• ? NEW: Gamification rules configuration (points, badges, rewards)

• ? NEW: Venue info management (floor plans, menus, WiFi, tips)

• ? NEW: Dance partner & roomie match management

• ? NEW: Early bird ticket triggers and loyalty rewards configuration

• ? NEW: Instructor profiles and poll/voting campaign management

• ? NEW: Advanced analytics: engagement, photos, gamification, retention

???  TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS  ???

• Cross-platform: iOS and Android (React Native or Flutter)

• Backend/API: Node.js, Python, or similar — scalable architecture

• Database: Firebase, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB

• Push Notifications: FCM or equivalent

• Real-time updates: WebSockets or Firebase Realtime Database

• ? NEW: API Integrations: Weeztix, Google Maps, Instagram, TikTok, Spotify, Apple Music

• ? NEW: Image storage: AWS S3, Firebase Storage, or Cloudinary for photo gallery

• ? NEW: Content moderation system for user-uploaded photos

• ? NEW: Matching algorithm for dance partner and roomie features

• ? NEW: Gamification engine with configurable rules

• ? NEW: Offline support for venue maps and schedules

• ? NEW: Deep linking for social media sharing

title: Supply Chain Manager
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail oriented Supply Chain Manager to support our growing e commerce business.



Your main responsibility will be to protect product quality before it becomes a customer service problem. You will work closely with suppliers, review product quality, monitor order related issues, and help us maintain high standards across our operations.



This is not a basic admin role. We need someone who can think critically, spot risks early, follow up consistently, and keep suppliers accountable.



Main responsibilities



• Perform quality control checks on products, suppliers, and order flows

• Review product photos, videos, and supplier information before products are scaled

• Follow up with suppliers about defects, inconsistencies, delays, or missing information

• Monitor recurring product issues and report patterns clearly

• Help improve internal quality control processes and supply chain workflows

• Communicate with the team when a product shows signs of risk or poor quality

• Keep track of supplier performance and reliability

• Support issue resolution related to product quality, fulfillment problems, or sourcing concerns

• Make sure product expectations match what is actually being delivered



What we are looking for



• Experience in supply chain, sourcing, quality control, product operations, or a similar role

• Strong attention to detail

• Good written English

• Able to communicate professionally with suppliers

• Able to work independently and take ownership

• Comfortable identifying problems and suggesting practical solutions

• Organized and structured in the way you work

• Experience with e commerce is a strong advantage

• Experience with Shopify, Google Sheets, Trello, Slack, or similar tools is a plus



What matters most to us



We care more about quality, consistency, and ownership than about impressive job titles.



We want someone who:

• notices small issues before they become big problems

• follows up without needing to be chased

• Please include the word “Ready” in the first line of your application so we know you carefully read the full job post.

• understands that poor product quality directly affects customer trust and profitability

• can help us build a stronger and more reliable back end



To apply



Please send:

• A short introduction about yourself

• Your relevant experience

• Examples of supply chain, sourcing, or quality control work you have done

• The tools you have worked with

• Your availability

• Your hourly rate

• The word quality in the first line of your application so we know you read everything carefully

title: Video Editor & Ad Creative Specialist (Remote – Part time and in he future Full time)
description:
Petsome is a fast-growing European pet supplement brand scaling across multiple markets. We run paid advertising on Meta across 5+ countries and we're looking for a skilled video editor who thrives in a performance marketing environment and can produce content that actually converts — not just looks good.



What you'll be working on:

The core of this role is producing and editing short-form Video Sales Letters (VSLs, 60–180 seconds) and UGC-style videos for Meta paid campaigns — content that feels native, builds trust fast, and drives purchases. Alongside this, you'll be adapting winning creatives into multiple languages (Slovenian, Croatian, Slovak, Italian, and potentially more), and creating organic TikTok content aimed at virality and brand awareness.



Your day-to-day will include:

Editing and producing short VSLs (60–180 seconds) optimized for Meta paid campaigns, editing and assembling UGC footage into polished ad-ready content, creating multiple language versions of existing creatives with translated subtitles, captions, and synced AI voiceovers, producing organic TikTok videos with a focus on hooks, trends, and viral potential, working with AI video and voiceover tools to scale content production across markets, and organizing and maintaining a creative asset library.



What we're looking for:

You have hands-on experience editing direct response video content — specifically short VSLs and UGC ads for Meta paid social. You understand pacing, hook structure, and how to make the first 3 seconds impossible to scroll past. You know how to work with raw UGC footage — bad lighting, shaky camera, background noise — and turn it into something that feels authentic but performs. You have a feel for what goes viral on TikTok and know the difference between content that gets views and content that builds a brand. You're fast, organized, and can manage multiple language versions simultaneously without mixing things up. You take feedback well and iterate quickly.



Must-have skills:

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, or CapCut, demonstrated experience editing short VSLs and UGC content for Meta ads specifically, subtitle and caption editing across multiple languages, some experience creating or editing organic TikTok content, and reliable internet connection with ability to handle large video files. 



Nice to have:

Experience with ElevenLabs or any AI voiceover tools for multilingual dubbing, familiarity with direct response marketing concepts (hooks, open loops, social proof, CTAs), and basic motion graphics or text animation for captions and overlays.



What we offer:

Part time at first but soon Full-time remote position with a fast-moving pet supplement brand, stable long-term engagement as we scale into new markets, clear briefs and feedback so you're never guessing what we want. 



Performance bonus

We believe in rewarding great work. If your creatives consistently perform well in our paid campaigns — strong hook rates, good ROAS, high retention — you'll receive performance bonuses on top of your base salary. The better the ads perform, the more you earn.



How to apply:

Send us your portfolio with at least 3 video ad examples you've edited or produced. TikTok content examples are a plus. Tell us which editing software you use and what AI tools you're comfortable with. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistance to USA locating, contracting, processing for big pay
description:
I am looking for people to head up and run a  business which requires lots of due diligence with online research, phone calls to USA during our normal hours of operation. You will be finding out where list of previous sales of real estate have been performed by local county governments  in certain states. 



You will be doing skip tracing to locate individual or corporate owners who have funds coming back but do not know they have funds available from sales of the lost properties. We find and contract to process these refunds and share in those refunds. 



You must be a self starter. You must be have computer skills to locate list of sold properties with refunds due the people who previously owned the property but lost it to tax sales. If you are a self starter, have good english speaking, reading and writing capabilities, and like what you hear so far then this might be for you either woman or man.



This job is for someone who can work really hard up front and long hours to research and skills to locate individual and make contact to tell them we found money for them and are willing to do the processing for them for a split of the money being returned with our help and efforts.



If you have an interest in this and can prove you have the necessary drive and skills and smarts to make it happen then contact me for this opportunity. 



Reply back in the subject " found money "  and include a short 45-60 seconds video of you telling me whats on your resume. The reason is so I can hear and see you as a person.



I'll can supply VPN,
 phone to USA, and
 account for the business for you to work from. 



Must be a self starter and DOERrrr, can think on there own, and take the necessary actions to get what ever needs to be done.



I will be your support in the USA and we will work this together. 



An example of the money potential for you show as this example. You found a good list from the county property tax sales and located and contacted the person due the refund of the excess funds. We contract with the people to do the processing to get the funds back and we split it 40/60 . Lets say the refund is $46,000 dollars then our company split is $18,400. The company takes 35% of that amount for its own ($6440) leaving the remaining to be split 50/50 which is $11,960 times 50% leaving your pay for that simple transaction taking up to 15hours from beginning to end, of $5980 is for YOU. 



If this is for you, let me know, ASAP and you can start immediately. I have the educational videos and files which will be granted to you for your education. Ya, there is training. Your going to know what to do each and every step of the way. Ill be there to support you too. 



Follow the instruction to reply to get a response from myself ... this is an open invitation to make good money doing research and processing paperwork, performing skip tracing locating the people. 

Open to all who want to give a go at it. 



Let me know what you think...



David Darby

title: SEO Specialist & AI Content Strategist
description:
NOTE: Please do not
 the client directly. We will only accommodate applicants who apply through OnlineJobs.



Join a remote team supporting a semi-famous American CEO and his portfolio of websites and clients! As featured in The Wall Street Journal and The New York Times. Your work will directly impact the SEO performance and growth of multiple websites and help real clients succeed online.



WHY IS THIS JOB AWESOME?

• Permanent WFH — forever, no commute, no office politics

• Great pay

• Fun team that genuinely values Filipino staff

• No two days are the same: diverse tasks across SEO, content, tools, and client calls

• A work culture that actually respects your sleep and rest — we mean it

• Flexible split-shift schedule designed around your life

• Fun boss (NICK MADE US TYPE THIS)

• Nick Gray loves arroz caldo and pork sisig. A true Filipino at heart.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for someone who lives and breathes SEO, is comfortable jumping on client calls, and knows how to use AI tools to work smarter — not just faster. You won't be writing articles from scratch, but you will be the person who knows exactly what a great article needs: the right structure, the right keywords, the right headings, internal links, meta descriptions, and everything else that makes content rank.



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. You'll be working across multiple websites, helping clients improve their search presence, and occasionally talking directly with clients to explain what you're doing and why.



SALARY AND BENEFITS

• Pay rate: $7–$10/hour depending on experience

• Government dues are the responsibility of the applicant



HOURS AND AVAILABILITY

• Core hours: 7:30 AM – 1:00 PM Central Time (includes a 30-minute break)

• Remaining 3 hours are async — work them anytime within the same day, on your own schedule

• Total of approximately 5 hours of live overlap + 3 hours flexible per day

• Split-shift friendly: we respect your time, your rest, and your life outside of work



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

SEO



• Conduct keyword research and on-page SEO optimization for blog posts and web pages

• Perform SEO audits and implement improvements across client websites

• Set up and monitor Google Search Console, identify issues, and act on data

• Write and optimize meta titles and descriptions

• Handle internal linking, schema, image alt text, and other on-page best practices

• Track rankings and report on SEO progress



Content & AI-Assisted Writing



• Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to assist with content production

• Know what makes a blog post rank: proper structure, headers, keyword placement, word count, readability, and CTAs

• Edit and refine AI-generated drafts to meet SEO and quality standards

• Brief writers or AI tools with the right inputs so content comes out right the first time



Client Communication



• Join calls with clients to discuss SEO strategy, progress, and recommendations

• Talk through content ideas and site updates directly with clients

• Communicate clearly and professionally — you're calm, articulate, and easy to talk to

• Send follow-up
s summarizing calls and next steps



Tools & Systems



• Use AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or similar to build or improve small internal tools and automations when needed

• Comfortable exploring and adopting new tools quickly



REQUIREMENTS

• Proven SEO experience — you've done this before and have results to show

• Fluent spoken and written English — strong communicator on calls and in writing

• Comfortable on video calls with clients

• Familiar with AI tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar

• Working knowledge of Google Search Console, and ideally other SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, Moz, Yoast, RankMath)

• Beginner-to-intermediate writing skills — you don't need to be a novelist, but you understand what good content looks like

• 50Mbps wired internet connection

• Desktop or laptop, plus headset and camera for calls

• Quiet working space



Nice to Have 



• Experience with AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Gemini in IDEs

• WordPress experience

• Familiarity with Airtable, Trello, or Google Suite



PERSONALITY OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

• Positive, reliable, and genuinely trustworthy

• Curious and always learning — especially about AI and SEO changes

• Proactive: you don't wait to be told, you spot problems and act

• Organized with strong attention to detail

• Adaptable — our work evolves fast and you roll with it



SOFTWARE TOOLS USED

• Google Search Console

• WordPress

• Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini

• Cursor or Claude Code (a plus)

• Google Suite: Docs, Sheets, Gmail

• Ahrefs / Semrush / Moz

• Yoast SEO or RankMath

• Trello

• Airtable

• Loom

•



HOW TO APPLY — LOOM VIDEO (REQUIRED)

Instead of a traditional cover letter, we want to see and hear from you directly. Record a 3–5 minute Loom video with your camera on and cover the following:



1. Quick intro — who you are and your background

2. Your SEO experience — describe one specific win you've had. What was the site, what did you do, and what happened to the rankings or traffic?

3. AI tools — what tools do you use regularly (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) and how do you actually use them in your work?

4. Client calls — how comfortable are you on video calls with clients, on a scale of 1–10? Share an example of a time you explained something technical to a non-technical person.



Camera must be on. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.



Include "SEO + AI" in your subject line so we know you read this far.

title: Senior Short Sale Processor – Real Estate
description:
We are looking for a tenacious, high-energy Senior Short Sale Processor to take full ownership of our short sale files. This is a remote, part-time role (20 hours/week) designed for someone who knows how to navigate the complexities of lender portals and bank negotiations. We need someone persistent, assertive, and driven to get approvals across the finish line.



You will work US Business Hours (EST) with flexibility, ensuring that banks, realtors, buyers, and sellers are consistently updated.



Top Responsibilities:

Lender Liaison: Communicate and follow up aggressively with banks, realtors, sellers, and title companies to move files toward closing.

Document Management: Collect, review, and organize complex "hardship packages" (financials, tax returns, bank statements, etc.) to ensure they are audit-ready.

Package Submission: Prepare and submit complete short sale packages via lender portals and respond immediately to any "missing doc" requests.

Foreclosure Tracking: Monitor foreclosure timelines and coordinate critical steps like BPOs/appraisals, payoff statements, and postponement requests.

Case Logging: Maintain meticulous digital notes and follow-up history for every file.



Requirements:

Must-Have: Proven experience in short sale processing with a track record of successfully obtaining short sale approvals.

Must-Have: Fluent and excellent verbal and written English skills (you will be negotiating on the phone daily).

Must-Have: A "hustler" personality—you are persistent, a self-starter, and don't take "no" for an answer from bank representatives.

Technical: Proficiency with standard office/PDF software and experience using VoIP phone systems.



Perks & Pay:

Hourly Rate: $
/month (depending on experience).

13th-Month Pay: Included.

Incentives of $50 per completed deal

Holidays: Paid holidays provided.

Flexibility: While you must be available during US business hours, we offer flexibility in how you structure your 20 hours.



About Us:

We are a fast-paced Title company operating in multiple U.S States. We specialize in distressed assets and pride ourselves on efficiency and speed. We value tea
mbers who work independently and take initiative without needing to be micromanaged.



Application Instructions:

Please follow these instructions exactly as applications that do not follow this format exactly will be ignored.

Change the subject line to: “I’m a hard worker [Insert the name of the CEO of Freddie Mac”

(Label this answer 1.) Why are you interested in this position? (2–3 sentences max)

(Label this answer 2.) What specific experience do you have with short sale processing and lender portals? (3–5 sentences)

(Label this answer 3.) Can you work EST business hours Monday–Friday?

(Label this answer 4.) Repeat your answer to question #2 to demonstrate you read this posting thoroughly.



Applications must follow this exact format to be considered. Your application will not be considered if you do not follow instructions exactly. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video interview to discuss experience, learning style, and cultural fit with our team.

title: Creator Partnerships Manager
description:
We run a OS app built to make calorie tracking feel effortless instead of exhausting. Instead of searching through endless menus or scanning barcodes, you can type what you ate like a quick message or snap a photo and let AI handle the rest. Logging takes seconds, gets faster over time as the app remembers your meals, and is designed so people actually stick with it. Rated 4.9 and loved by thousands.



This is not a generic social media role. This is a performance role focused on finding high volume right creators (
per day outreach), negotiating strong deals, getting creators signed, and getting first posts live.



Creators will film and post on their own TikTok and Instagram accounts. You will own creator sourcing, scoring, outreach, follow-ups, negotiation, scheduling, asset collection, pinned comments, and daily tracker updates so we can clearly see what is working.



We want someone who is already AI-native in real work. You should already use AI for sourcing, creator scoring, message drafting, research, notes, and reporting. This is not a fit for someone who only uses ChatGPT occasionally.



You will find creators on TikTok and Instagram, review their recent short-form view history, evaluate whether their comment sections look real, and assess whether their branded posts perform worse than their normal posts. You will d
 whether a creator is worth contacting, send cold outreach, keep follow-ups current, reply quickly to warm leads, negotiate four-video packages, brief creators, get first posts moving, collect raw assets, manage pinned comments, and keep reporting and tracker data updated daily.



We evaluate creators based on expected branded views, not follower count. If a creator's last ten shorts average 50,000 views but their last three branded posts average 28,000 views, pricing is based on 28,000, not 50,000.



A qualified creator for us is someone with real short-form view history, content that fits fitness, weight loss, meal prep, grocery, or day-in-the-life, a real-looking comment section, branded posts strong enough to price from, and willingness to do a four-video package based on expected views.



A creator at final terms stage means pricing is actively being finalized in writing. A live first post means the first video is posted on the creator's own account, the pinned comment is live, the raw asset has been collected, and the tracker has been updated.



Strong performance during the paid seven-day trial means sending 500 fresh DMs, keeping follow-ups current, maintaining a clean tracker, generating at least eight positive replies, starting at least five real negotiations with qualified creators, and either signing at least one creator or pushing at least two creators to final terms stage. We care about real deal progress, not fake activity.



Ongoing monthly performance means sending 2,000 fresh DMs every 30 days, generating at least ten positive replies from qualified creators, starting at least six real negotiations, signing at least four creators into four-video deals, and getting at least four first posts live. The tracker must be updated daily with pipeline status, pricing history, negotiation stage, posting dates, views, installs, trial starts, and revenue by creator.



Apply only if you have personally handled high-volume creator outreach, negotiated creator deals, owned outcomes rather than just awareness, and run your own tracker without constant supervision. This is not a fit for agencies, junior VAs, generic influencer marketers, gifting-only campaign managers, people who need constant supervision, or people who plan to pass the work to someone else after getting hired.



The hiring process starts with a JobStreet application, followed by a short screening form, then a video interview, then a paid seven-day trial, and finally an ongoing full-time contractor role if the trial is strong.



To apply, start your JobStreet application with the letter X. Shortlisted applicants will receive a screening form where you will answer two questions. The first asks what tools you use to find creators, send outreach at scale, and manage follow-ups without losing leads, and you must describe your actual stack. The second asks how you would price a creator whose last ten shorts average 50,000 views but whose last three branded posts average 28,000, and at what cost-per-install the deal stops making sense.



You must also include your price for the paid seven-day trial.



We're so excited to hear from you.

title: Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer - Amazon Germany
description:
Compensation: $5.00 USD / Hour (~€4.50 EUR / 50,000 PHP Monthly) + Performance Bonuses

Location: Fully Remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, Flexible Hours

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring an experienced Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer for a growing Amazon FBA business based in Germany currently doing €60-80K/month in revenue. Sourcing is your primary job, the majority of your time will be spent finding and evaluating profitable leads on a consistent daily basis. If you're someone who's great at sourcing and can work independently without being micromanaged, this role is for you.

 

Responsibilities?

Source profitable OA leads daily using Keepa and seller storefronts

Evaluate leads using sales rank history, price trends, offer counts, and margin analysis before submitting

Hit daily and monthly spend targets with minimal supervision (starting goal: €10K/month)

Work confidently with German product listings using Chrome translator and AI tools to verify product details and sizing

Keep lead quality consistent and make sure submitted leads meet the criteria set by management

Flag and inform management of any red flags such as sudden price drops, spiking offer counts, or anything that could affect lead quality or account health

Bring your own sourcing approach to the table, if something works better than what we're doing, we want to know

 

Requirements

2+ years of hands-on OA sourcing experience for Amazon FBA

Strong proficiency with Keepa, able to read charts and predict where price and offer count are heading

Knows how buy box rotation works and how FBA vs FBM affects it

Able to spot red flags right away such as brands selling on their own listing, misbranded products, and IP complaint-prone items

Experience using Seller Amp (SAS) or similar tools for profit and ROI calculations

Experience with multiple sourcing methods such as storefront stalking, reverse sourcing, and brand sourcing

Able to use Keepa Product Finder with the right filters to find leads from scratch

Knows how to use coupon code extensions and newsletter signups to maximize discounts when sourcing

Able to estimate rough profitability without a tool, just from the buy box price and buy cost

Comfortable working with non-English listings using translation tools and AI

Self-directed: you show up, do the work, and don't need someone checking in on you constantly

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work setup

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience sourcing specifically for Amazon European marketplaces

Familiarity with German product categories and seasonal trends



To Apply


/4uUUJMS

title: Fluent English Healthcare Appointment Setter – Part Time – 5 Hours/Day
description:
Fluent English Healthcare Appointment Setter – Part Time – 5 Hours/Day



We are looking for a strong appointment setter who can help us generate real meetings, not just make calls.



This is a part-time remote outbound calling role focused on helping us book qualified introductory Zoo
etings with healthcare-related buyers in the United States.



You will be calling into healthcare-related businesses, distributors, DME/HME companies, and other relevant accounts, identifying the right contact, and scheduling 20-minute introductory meetings for our sales team.



This is not a general VA role.

This is a phone-heavy sales role for someone who is confident, organized, professional, and comfortable speaking with U.S. business contacts.



What you’ll be doing



* Make outbound cold calls to targeted healthcare-related accounts in the United States

* Navigate gatekeepers professionally

* Identify the right buyer or decision-maker

* Schedule qualified 20-minute Zoo
etings

* Send follow-up and reminder
s

* Update Zoho CRM in real time with notes, outcomes, and next steps

* Stay organized with follow-up and help keep opportunities moving



What we sell



We represent a growing healthcare product line focused on care and comfort solutions, including healthcare mattresses, adjustable bases, mobility beds, and related products.



Who this role is for



This role is for someone who:



* speaks very clear, fluent English

* sounds natural, confident, and professional on the phone

* has real cold calling and appointment setting experience

* is comfortable calling U.S. businesses

* knows how to professionally work through gatekeepers

* can stay organized and disciplined in CRM

* wants a performance-driven role where results matter



Requirements



* Excellent spoken English and strong listening skills

* Proven cold calling and appointment setting experience

* Experience calling U.S. businesses

* Experience calling healthcare, medical, HME/DME, distribution, or B2B accounts is a major plus

* Comfortable using Zoho CRM or a similar CRM

* Available 5 hours per day, 25 hours per week, during U.S. Pacific Time business hours

* Reliable internet and a quiet calling environment

* Strong follow-up habits and attention to detail



Compensation



$6.00 to $8.00 per hour, depending on experience

plus

$25.00 to $40.00 for every qualified appointment that attends the Zoo
eting



We are open to paying more for someone with strong experience, fluent English, and a proven track record of booking real meetings.



What success looks like



* You sound polished, warm, and credible on the phone

* You can get to the right person

* You can create interest without overexplaining

* You can consistently book qualified meetings

* You keep CRM notes clean and current

* You help generate a real pipeline



How to apply



Please send all of the following:



1. A short summary of your cold calling and appointment setting experience

2. A voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your background

3. The industries you have called into before

4. Any results you can share, including appointments booked, show rates, or conversion numbers

5. Your hourly rate expectation



To show attention to detail, please begin your application with:

"Blue Zoom"



Important



We are looking for someone who can actually move the needle.



If you are fluent in English, confident on the phone, organized in CRM, and know how to book real meetings with U.S. prospects, we would like to hear from you.

title: Media Buyer (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us



Canine Conversions is a fast-growing digital marketing agency based in the United States. We specialize in running
 and Instagram ads for dog training businesses, helping them generate high-quality leads and scale their companies efficiently.



As our team continues to expand, we’re looking for a skilled and analytical Media Buyer to join our performance marketing department. This is a fantastic opportunity to work with a proven business model, world-class training, and a results-driven team culture. If you’re data-driven, creative, and passionate about delivering measurable results, this role is for you.



About the Role



We’re seeking a Media Buyer to manage, optimize, and scale paid ad campaigns primarily on
 and Instagram. You’ll be responsible for strategy execution, budget management, and continuous performance improvement to help our clients achieve outstanding results.



This is a fully remote position with a starting salary of $700/month, working Monday to Friday, following Pacific Standard Time (PST).





What You’ll Do



Plan, launch, and optimize paid media campaigns across
 and Instagram.



Conduct audience research and create targeted ad sets that align with client goals.



Test ad creatives, copy, and placements to maximize conversion rates and ROI.



Monitor daily performance metrics and make data-driven adjustments.



Report on campaign performance, insights, and recommendations to leadership.



Collaborate with the creative and operations teams to improve ad results.



Stay updated on platform changes, policies, and best practices in digital advertising.



Manage ad budgets efficiently to meet performance benchmarks.





What We’re Looking For



Proven experience running
 and/or Instagram ad campaigns.



Strong understanding of ad metrics (CPC, CPM, CTR, ROAS, etc.) and optimization strategies.



Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make informed decisions.



Experience with tools such as Ads Manager, Google Sheets, and basic tracking software.



Excellent communication and organizational skills.



High attention to detail and accountability.



Reliable internet connection and computer/laptop.



Comfortable working PST hours (Monday–Friday).







Ready to Apply?



If you’re a results-oriented Media Buyer who thrives in a fast-paced, high-performance environment, we’d love to meet you. Apply now and help us continue delivering incredible results for dog trainers across the country!

title: Remote Operations & Client Success Representative (Virtual Assistant)
description:
About Us



Molly Maid of Central Westchester is a growing cleaning referral agency serving Westchester County, NY and surrounding areas. We connect clients with vetted, professional independent cleaners for residential and commercial spaces. We operate 7 days a week and pride ourselves on quality, trust, and convenience.



We're a lean, remote team — and we need someone sharp, reliable, and self-driven to help us operate and grow.



The Role

This is not a typical VA position. We're looking for someone who can eventually run day-to-day operations independently — think area manager in a remote setting. You'll handle everything from answering client inquiries to coordinating cleaners to closing new bookings. If you're a go-getter who takes ownership and communicates exceptionally well, keep reading.



Your Responsibilities

• Answer inbound calls, texts, and
s from clients promptly and professionally (U.S.-based clientele)

• Handle booking, scheduling, and calendar management

• Conduct outbound follow-ups to leads and past clients

• Close new bookings using our pricing and promotions

• Recruit, vet, and onboard independent cleaning professionals

• Manage client satisfaction follow-ups; resolve issues and escalations

• Post and engage on social media 
, Instagram, Google)

• Maintain records in our CRM/tracking tools

• Identify and flag operational issues to the owner

• Take initiative to improve processes — we want someone who brings ideas, not just tasks

 

You Are a Great Fit If You:

• Have excellent spoken and written English — you'll be communicating directly with U.S. clients by phone, text, and

• Are highly organized and can manage multiple priorities without hand-holding

• Have experience in customer service, sales, or operations (service industry a plus)

• Are proactive — you follow up, flag problems early, and don't wait to be told

• Are comfortable working U.S. Eastern Time hours (full or partial overlap required)

• Have a reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

• Are looking for a long-term position with growth opportunity

 

Bonus Points For:

• Experience with a U.S.-based service business (cleaning, home services, real estate, etc.)

• Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, Jobber, or similar CRMs

• Social media content creation experience

 

What We Offer

• Competitive bi-weekly Pay

• Performance commissions 

• Stable, long-term position with a growing company

• Performance-based raises

• Clear growth path — we develop from within

• Supportive owner who provides systems, training, and tools



**How to apply**



Read carefully — applications that don't follow these steps will not be reviewed.

1. Send your resume 

2. In the subject line or first line of your message, write: "I read the full post – MM Application"

3. Include a 2–3 sentence answer to this question: "Describe a time you handled a difficult customer or solved a problem without being told what to do."

4. Include your available hours in U.S. Eastern Time

5. Record a 60–90 second voice or video message answering this question: "Tell us who you are, why you're a great fit for this role, and how you would handle a client who calls upset because their cleaner didn't show up." Upload it to Google Drive, Loom, or Dropbox and include the link in your application.



Applications without all 5 items — including the recording link — will not be reviewed.
