title: Virtual CIO (vCIO) – Strategic IT Consultant
description:
We are seeking a strategic and business-minded Virtual CIO (vCIO) to serve as a high-level advisor for our diverse portfolio of business clients. In this role, you will act as an extension of our clients' executive teams, bridging the gap between their business goals and their technology infrastructure.

 

As a vCIO, you are not just a technical expert; you are a strategic partner. You will be responsible for developing long-term IT roadmaps, managing technology budgets, overseeing risk and compliance, and ensuring that every technical investment our clients make drives measurable business value. The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of Managed Services (MSP), excellent consultative skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business strategies.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Strategic IT Roadmapping & Planning

   - Conduct regular Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) with clients to align technology with their 1–3 year business goals.

   - Develop and maintain comprehensive IT roadmaps, including hardware lifecycle management, cloud migrations, and 

     security enhancements.

   - Identify emerging technologies that can provide a competitive advantage or operational efficiency for specific client 

     verticals.

*Budgeting & Financial Management

   - Assist clients in developing and managing annual IT budgets.

   - Provide Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis for new technology investments.

   - Help clients prioritize IT spending based on risk, ROI, and business impact.

*Risk, Security & Compliance

   - Oversee client security postures, ensuring alignment with frameworks like NIST, CIS, or industry-specific regulations 

     (HIPAA, PCI, SOC2).

   - Lead Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity (BC) planning and testing.

   - Act as a high-level advisor during security i
 or complex technical audits.

*Client Relationship & Account Leadership

   - Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-level stakeholders (CEOs, CFOs, Owners).

   - Monitor client satisfaction and service delivery trends, working with the technical team to ensure high standards are met.

   - Lead the technical onboarding of new high-value clients, setting the strategic foundation from day one.

*Vendor & Project Oversight

  - Assist clients in evaluating and managing third-party technology vendors (ISPs, Line-of-Business software, etc.).

  - Provide high-level oversight for major infrastructure projects to ensure they stay aligned with the strategic vision.

 

Qualifications

Required

- Experience: 7–10+ years of experience in IT leadership, senior systems engineering, or IT consulting (MSP experience is highly preferred).

- Strategic Mindset: Proven ability to develop long-term technology strategies that solve real-world business problems.

- Financial Literacy: Comfort managing budgets, performing ROI calculations, and discussing financial impact with executives.

- Communication Excellence: Exceptional ability to present to "C-Suite" executives and translate "geek-speak" into "business-speak."

- Broad Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of Microsoft 365, Cloud Infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Networking, and Cybersecurity frameworks.

- Consultative Approach: Strong ability to influence stakeholders and lead through consensus and expertise.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

- Experience with ITIL frameworks or MSP-specific vCIO tools.

- Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, PMP, or advanced Microsoft/Cloud certifications).

- Previous experience in a "Fractional CIO" or "Account Lead" role within a technical service organization.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Clients view you as an indispensable member of their leadership team, not just a "vendor."

- Client IT environments are stable, secure, and proactively managed according to a documented roadmap.

- Technology spend is predictable for the client, with fewer "emergency" expenses.

- High client retention and growth through trusted, strategic recommendations.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



*Submit your application and include the numbers (3812) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



*Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.

This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8AM-5PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Senior Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
Job Overview

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a high-level Senior Business Systems Specialist to help us build, lead, and scale our Software Solutions department. This is a unique, multi-disciplinary role designed for a strategic thinker who sits at the intersection of Finance, Business Operations, and Technology.

 

We aren't just looking for an implementer; we are looking for a partner in growth. You will work directly with leadership to build out our service offerings, meet with potential clients to architect solutions, and eventually help us recruit and mentor the team that will execute your vision. If you have a deep understanding of Dynamics 365, a passion for Power BI analytics, and the business acumen to solve complex operational problems, we want to hear from you.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Practice Development & Strategy

  - Partner with leadership to define and build out our Software Solutions Department services and "go-to-market" strategy.

  - Develop standardized implementation methodologies, project templates, and best practices for the team.

  - Identify and vet new tools and integration patterns that can be productized for our client base.



*Presales & Solution Architecture

  - Join leadership in high-level discovery meetings with potential clients to identify pain points and opportunities.

  - Translate business requirements into technical "Proof of Concepts" and high-level solution designs.

  - Lead the technical scoping and pricing of projects, ensuring Scopes of Work (SOWs) are accurate, profitable, and achievable.



*Senior Implementation & Delivery

  - Act as the lead consultant for high-value Dynamics 365 and Power Platform implementations.

  - Architect advanced Power BI reporting suites that provide clients with real-time visibility into their financial and operational health.

  - Oversee complex data migrations and system integrations, ensuring data integrity across the client's tech stack.



*Team Building & Mentorship

  - Help define the roles and skills needed as we scale the Software Solutions department.

  - Assist in the interviewing, hiring, and onboarding of junior specialists and engineers.

  - Provide technical mentorship and "over-the-shoulder" guidance to ensure high-quality delivery across all projects.



*Operational & Financial Consulting

  - Use your understanding of business operations and finance to advise clients on process improvements (e.g., automated billing, inventory management, financial consolidation).

  - Ensure system configurations align with GAAP/audit requirements and support the client's long-term scalability.

 

Required Qualifications

* Experience: 7–10+ years in business systems consulting, solution architecture, or IT leadership (MSP or Professional Services experience is a major plus).

* Business & Finance Acumen: A strong understanding of core business operations and accounting principles (P&L, Cash Flow, AP/AR, and operational workflows).

* Dynamics 365 Mastery: Proven track record of architecting and implementing Dynamics 365 environments.

* Power BI Expertise: Advanced skills in data modeling and creating executive-level dashboards.

* Presales & Scoping: Experience meeting with clients, identifying needs, and building out detailed project scopes and pricing models.

* Leadership Mindset: A desire to move beyond "doing the work" into building a practice and leading a team.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

* Professional accounting background or deep experience with ERP financial modules.

* Experience with the broader Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate).

* Previous experience in a "Founding" or "Lead" role within a growing technical practice.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

* Phase 1: You are successfully co-leading sales meetings, closing new projects, and delivering high-value implementations.

* Phase 2: You have established a repeatable "playbook" for our business systems offerings and project delivery.

* Phase 3: You are leading a small, high-performing team of specialists, allowing you to focus more on strategy, high-level architecture, and practice growth.



Why Join Us?

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
FULL-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT NEEDED

Social Media | Medical License Admin | APP Coordination | Telemedicine Scheduling | Bookkeeping



=============================================================================

POSITION OVERVIEW

=============================================================================



Position: Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Schedule: 40 hours/week, Monday-Friday

Required Overlap: 3-4 hours with US Eastern business hours (9 AM - 5 PM ET)

Start Date: ASAP with paid 1-week trial period

Salary: $800-1,100 USD/month + 13th month bonus



=============================================================================

ABOUT THE EMPLOYER

=============================================================================



I'm Edwin Wu, a physician and entrepreneur building WedgeKit, a startup validation platform. I need a reliable, detail-oriented virtual assistant to take ownership of five critical business areas. This is a long-term position for someone ready to grow with the business.



=============================================================================

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES (5 MAIN AREAS)

=============================================================================



AREA 1: SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT

- Set up and manage WedgeKit brand accounts on:
/X,
, Instagram, LinkedIn, Reddit, Google Ads, TikTok, and Metricool

- Schedule and publish content using Metricool across all platforms

- Monitor engagement, respond to comments and DMs

- Create basic graphics using Canva (templates provided)

- Track and report on ad performance weekly

- Grow follower base through organic engagement strategies



AREA 2: MEDICAL LICENSE ADMINISTRATION

- Maintain master tracker of all active US state licenses with renewal dates, CE requirements, and status

- Set up renewal reminders (90+ days before expiration)

- Communicate with US Healthcare Licensing (Amy Weber's team) via

- Coordinate renewals, follow up on pending items, relay questions

- Flag upcoming deadlines, missing documents, or issues

- Keep organized records in Google Drive



AREA 3: BOOKKEEPING - QUICKBOOKS ONLINE

- Set up QuickBooks Online from scratch: chart of accounts, bank/credit card connections, categories

- Categorize and reconcile transactions weekly

- Generate and send invoices as needed

- Track business expenses and receipts

- Prepare basic monthly financial summaries (P&L, expense breakdown)

- Coordinate with CPA/accountant at tax time



AREA 4: CALENDAR MANAGEMENT & APP COORDINATION

- Manage Google Calendar: schedule meetings, block clinical time, prevent conflicts

- Schedule and send invites for required monthly supervisory meetings with APPs (Advanced Practice Providers)

- Send meeting agendas and follow-up action items

- Handle rescheduling across time zones

- Maintain tracker of state-specific supervisory requirements

- Track chart review completion per state per cycle

- Correspond with APPs for routine administrative matters

- Keep organized records of reviews, meeting notes, correspondence in Google Drive



AREA 5: TELEMEDICINE SCHEDULE MANAGEMENT

- Manage availability and shift schedule across multiple telemedicine platforms

- Prevent double-booking by cross-referencing schedules and syncing with master calendar

- Pick up, drop, or swap shifts as directed

- Communicate with platform scheduling teams when needed

- Track platform-specific requirements (credentialing status, deadlines, minimum hours)

- Provide weekly schedule summary every Monday



=============================================================================

TOOLS YOU'LL USE

=============================================================================



- Metricool (content scheduling)

- Meta Business Suite

- Google Ads & TikTok Ads

- QuickBooks Online

- Google Calendar & Google Workspace

- Slack/Email

- Telemedicine platforms

- Canva (for basic graphics)



=============================================================================

MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS

=============================================================================



- 3+ years experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar administrative role

- Hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online (setup and daily use)

- Experience managing social media accounts for a business (not just personal)

- Excellent written English - you'll
 US-based professionals on my behalf

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail (compliance deadlines are critical)

- Experience with calendar management and scheduling across multiple platforms/time zones

- Comfortable corresponding with healthcare professionals in a professional tone

- Available for at least 3-4 hours overlap with US Eastern business hours

- Reliable internet connection and own computer



=============================================================================

NICE-TO-HAVE QUALIFICATIONS

=============================================================================



- QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification

- Experience with Meta Business Manager and ad account setup

- Familiarity with US healthcare licensing, credentialing, or physician supervision

- Experience with Canva, Metricool, or similar scheduling tools

- Experience with telemedicine platforms or healthcare scheduling systems

- Startup or entrepreneurial experience



=============================================================================

SCREENING QUESTIONS - PLEASE ANSWER ALL 8

=============================================================================



1. Brief introduction about yourself and your relevant VA/admin experience



2. Describe your QuickBooks Online experience. Have you set it up from scratch before? What types of businesses have you done bookkeeping for?



3. Which social media platforms have you managed for a business, and what tools did you use for scheduling?



4. Have you ever tracked deadlines or renewals (licenses, permits, subscriptions, etc.) for a client? How did you organize it?



5. Have you managed a calendar for someone who works across multiple platforms or locations? How did you prevent scheduling conflicts?



6. Have you ever corresponded with medical professionals or healthcare staff on behalf of a client? If so, describe the context.



7. What are your available working hours in Philippine time, and how many hours overlap with US Eastern (9 AM - 5 PM ET)?



8. Your expected monthly salary in USD



=============================================================================

WHAT YOU'LL GET

=============================================================================



- Competitive salary with annual review

- 13th month bonus (December)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- Paid sick and vacation days (after trial period)

- Variety of work - no two days are the same

- Room to grow as the business scales

- Long-term career opportunity



=============================================================================

HOW TO APPLY

=============================================================================



Please answer all 8 screening questions above in your application. Important: Include the words "Bandana Pineapple" in your subject line of your reply. Not including these words will result in our disregard of your application. Include a brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience.



I am looking for a start date of next week so time is of the essence.



If we're a good fit, I'll schedule a short video call and offer a paid 1-week trial so we can both ensure it works well.



I review every application carefully.



Contact: Edwin Wu

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.

 

This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

   - Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

  - Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

  - Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

  - Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

  - Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

  - Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

  - Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

  - Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

  - Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

  - Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

  - Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

  - Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

*Familiarity with security tools (Antivirus, Firewalls, MDM solutions).

*Any IT certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft Fundamentals).

mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

title: Demand Generation Specialist
description:
The Demand Generation Specialist will be responsible for creating, executing, and optimizing multi-channel marketing campaigns that generate high-quality, sales-ready leads (MQLs) and accelerate pipeline growth. This role requires a strong blend of analytical skill, creative campaign execution, and technical marketing expertise within a complex B2G/B2I sales environment. The ideal candidate has 3+ years of hands-on experience in an agency environment, primarily managing the technical execution of demand generation campaigns in a B2B environment, with a demonstrable track record of improving MQL velocity and quality. This is a Full-Time Remote based role.



Responsibilities & Duties

Campaign Deployment: They are responsible for the hands-on building and launching of all lead generation campaigns.

Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): They own the testing and optimization of all conversion points—landing pages, forms, and calls-to-action (CTAs). By improving conversion rates by even a few percentage points, they can instantly boost lead volume without increasing ad spend, directly accelerating lead generation efficiency.

Budget Efficiency: They manage the day-to-day bidding and targeting in advertising platforms, ensuring the budget is spent on high-performing segments and channels, which lowers the Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) and makes growth more sustainable.

MarTech Management: They manage the technical connections between advertising platforms such as LinkedIn, Google and our source of truth (HubSpot). This ensures reliable data flow, preventing "leaks" in the funnel where valuable leads might be lost.

Lead Nurturing Mechanics: They build, test, and segment the automated
 nurture tracks, ensuring MQLs who aren't yet sales-ready remain engaged with relevant, value-driven content until they show enough intent for a sales handoff.

Lead Follow up: Proactively follow up with new prospects after a webinar and after new prospects have connected with the S2C team at an event.

Reporting: Ensure accurate reporting of new leads and conversations generated.

Audience Segmentation: They execute precise audience targeting based on defined Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs)(e.g., industry, revenue, size, specific titles, existing technology).

Other duties as assigned.



What Success Looks Like

Pipeline generation meets/exceeds goals, becomes more consistent, measurable, and repeatable

The expectation will be to generate 50 net new leads per week, or 200 net news leads per month (you d
 on channel mix)

Marketing and Sales operate with clearer handoffs and strong alignment

HubSpot reporting becomes more trusted and actionable

Messaging and campaigns become sharper, more strategic, and more effective

Leadership gains better visibility into what marketing is contributing and where to invest next

title: Project Manager
description:
Organization: Non Profit 

Hours: Part-time, flexible (estimated 15-25 hrs/week to start, may grow)

Compensation: $7-10/hr USD

Time Zone: EST



ABOUT THE ORGANIZATION

It started with a storm. After a hurricane devastated communities across Puerto Rico, a small team of volunteers showed up with tools, food, and a simple belief: people deserve to be helped. Three years later, that belief has become 200+ missions, 1435+ roofs repaired, 33 farms supported, 1,100 people fed - and a verified world record of 1.1 million acts of kindness in a single week.



Now the movement is going global. Our Pay It Forward campaign is scaling to 200 countries with a goal of 1 billion acts of kindness. We are a local Puerto Rico and federally certified 501(c)(3) non-profit, and we operate the same way we always have - lean, mission-first, and built on people who actually care.

If you want a role where your work shows up in someone's life, not just a dashboard, this might be your place.



THE ROLE

You are the glue between our systems and our people.



We have a fully built tech infrastructure: Notion, Airtable, Slack, OneDrive, and Claude AI. Our systems developer has designed and documented the full setup and is creating SOPs and training videos. But he's a builder, not a manager. 



That's where you come in.



Your job is to make sure people actually use the system. You help onboard new tea
mbers. You follow up when tasks go quiet. You answer questions when someone gets stuck. You are the human layer between a smart system and a growing global team of volunteers.



The system is the engine. You make sure everyone knows how to drive it - and that no one stalls out.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Onboarding and Training

- Onboard new regional managers, country directors, and core team volunteers into the tech stack (Notion, Airtable, Slack)

- Walk them through SOPs and training materials created by the developer

- Answer questions, troubleshoot access issues, and make sure everyone is set up and confident

- Be the first point of contact for anyone joining the global team



Project Coordination

- Track tasks and milestones across the global team

- Follow up with tea
mbers on deadlines, deliverables, and incomplete tasks

- Send reminders, check in on progress, and flag blockers to leadership

- Keep the Notion workspace and Airtable organized and current



Systems Support

-Know the tech stack inside and out

-Identify when something is broken, confusing, or needs improvement

-Coordinate with the developer or leadership when system changes are needed

-Use Claude AI to support documentation, queries, and process improvements



Communication

-Attend brief weekly check-ins with leadership

-Provide simple status updates on team activity and progress



WHO YOU ARE



Must-haves:

- Solid experience with Notion and Airtable

- Experience with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar)

- Must have Project Management experience

- Must have reliable internet connection

- Experience with volunteer-driven or non-profit organizations is a plus

- Experience in Lovable and Wordpress website updating is a plus



Personality fit:

- Patient and people-oriented - you're working with volunteers, not employees. They need clarity and encouragement, not pressure.

- Communicative - you surface problems early instead of waiting for them to grow

- Mission-driven - you understand that behind every task is a real person who needed help

- Calm under ambiguity - things are still being built, and you're okay with that

title: B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist
description:
B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist

Full-Time

$600 / month

$800 after 3 months



About Us

Trustyfy is a global technology company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time since the invention of modern banking, customers, not banks, can have full ownership of their money.

Through our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized infrastructure, businesses can operate globally without payment delays and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banking systems. Workers can remit funds to their families with minimal fees, and billions of unbanked individuals gain access to financial independence.

We are not just building the future of finance. We are building technology that creates real-world impact.

Our vision is validated through strong recurring revenue and a successful seed round, and we are now scaling our global team to support the next phase of growth.

Why Your Role Matters

As a B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist, you will help business clients confidently navigate crypto transactions and blockchain workflows. Your ability to combine excellent customer service with technical accuracy will ensure clients can securely send, receive, and verify digital funds while trusting Trustyfy’s infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

Provide exceptional support to users and business clients via
, chat, and phone, ensuring prompt and accurate issue resolution.





Educate and guide users on interacting with decentralized applications (DApps) and using crypto wallets securely, including tools such as MetaMask.





Assist clients with sending, receiving, and verifying crypto transactions, including transaction validation using explorers such as Etherscan.





Troubleshoot issues related to blockchain networks, wallet integrations, and decentralized applications.





Collaborate with technical and product teams to escalate and resolve complex cases.





Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, technical concerns, and service recommendations.

Skills and Experience

Experience: Minimum of 2 years in customer service, technical support, or client success, ideally within fintech, Web3, or blockchain environments.





Technical Knowledge: Familiarity with crypto wallets, blockchain transactions, and DApps. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new Web3 tools.





Customer Service Skills: Strong communication, empathy, and client-focused problem-solving abilities.





Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts.





Problem Solving: Strong troubleshooting and analytical thinking skills with high attention to detail.





Work Ethic: Highly reliable, self-motivated, and capable of working independently in a remote environment.





Availability:

Schedule Options: UK, US or AUS timezones

Must be open to working on weekends

40 hours per week, 5 working days



Salary

YOUR PAYMENT IS FIXED AND GUARANTEED. This means you will be paid even if workload temporarily fluctuates (although consistent workload is expected).



To apply for this position, please write in the subject line:

“I am a B2B Crypto Customer Support Specialist [Name + Surname]”

title: Expert E-commerce Video Editor for Meta Ads
description:
We are looking for an experienced e-commerce video editor who knows how to turn raw influencer content into high-converting video ads for Meta,
, and Instagram.



This is not a job for a general video editor.



We need someone who understands direct response marketing, customer psychology, hooks, retention, scroll-stopping edits, and how to create ads that do more than just look nice.



We want ads that:



grab attention fast



keep people watching



make people click



help turn viewers into customers



Most of our content comes from influencers / UGC creators, and your job will be to take that raw footage and turn it into engaging e-commerce ads that are built to sell.



You must have at least 3 to 5 years of experience editing video ads for e-commerce products.



If you do not have real experience creating high-performing e-commerce ads, please do not apply.



We are only looking for someone who already knows what they are doing.



What we need from you:



3 to 5+ years of experience editing e-commerce video ads



Strong experience editing UGC / influencer content and other formats



Understanding of Meta ads, especially for
 and Instagram



Ability to create strong hooks, fast-paced edits, captions, text overlays, callouts, music, and ad structures that improve engagement and conversions



Proof of previous work



Examples of ads you have edited for e-commerce brands



Understanding of what makes an ad convert, not just look good



Important:

You must send proof of work.



Please include:



examples of e-commerce ads you edited



links or files of your best work



a short explanation of what products / brands you worked on



if possible, share any results your ads helped generate



We will go through a testing process to make sure we are a good fit.



We have a strict application process because we do not have time to waste.



We are looking for someone who is serious, skilled, reliable, and confident in what they do.



This role can be part-time or full-time to start, but if you are the right fit, we are looking for a long-term person who can work with us for years to come.



So if you are an expert in editing e-commerce video ads that sell, and you want a serious long-term opportunity, apply now.



If you are just a general editor with no real e-commerce ad experience, this will not be the right fit.



To apply, start your application with the words:

“I understand e-commerce ads.”



That way I know you have read everything properly.

title: Full Time - Professional Video Editor for E-commerce Brands
description:
We are hiring a FULL-TIME (40 hours per week, 5 days a week) highly skilled Video Editor to join our fast-growing Shopify e-commerce team. This is not a casual freelance position. We are looking for a serious performance editor who understands direct-response marketing and knows how to create video ads that convert impulsive buyers into immediate customers. If you only focus on making aesthetic edits without understanding conversion psychology, this role is not for you.



Our brand relies heavily on powerful, scroll-stopping creatives that drive purchases. Your primary responsibility will be producing high-converting video ads for platforms such as Meta and TikTok. You must be capable of delivering 3–5 high-quality video ads per day, ranging from 30 seconds to 2 minutes, while maintaining strong performance standards. Speed matters, but quality and conversion performance matter more.



You will be responsible for editing UGC-style ads, product demonstrations, problem-solution creatives, competitor-style variations, and scaling ads. You must be able to combine footage from multiple sources seamlessly, and you will be expected to source most — if not all — of the footage yourself using our systems and your own initiative. This includes sourcing high-quality B-roll even when raw content is limited. You must be able to structure strong 3-second hooks, build emotional engagement, optimize pacing for retention, and add captions, sound design, and motion graphics that increase watch time and conversion rate.



A strong emphasis is placed on your ability to leverage AI tools effectively within your workflow. You should be proficient with tools such as Midjourney, Atria, Arcads, Heygen, ElevenLabs, Sora, Kling AI and similar platforms commonly used in high-performance e-commerce content creation. You should be capable of generating realistic AI-assisted B-roll (for example: a person naturally holding or interacting with a product, lifestyle scenarios, or product usage 
nts) that integrates seamlessly with real footage and does not appear artificial or overproduced. AI is not the entire role, but it is a major performance advantage and a key expectation.



You must be highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro. Experience with After Effects, CapCut Pro, and other AI-based editing tools is strongly preferred. You must be comfortable using AI tools in your workflow, including voice cloning and AI voiceovers.



Additional responsibilities include accurate labeling and organization of all video ads, working within 
 for structured reviews and feedback, collaborating through Miro boards for creative planning and ad structuring, revising creatives quickly based on feedback, following detailed instructions precisely, and collaborating effectively with the team. You must be able to take a blueprint and not only execute it correctly but elevate it. We are not looking for someone who follows instructions mechanically. We want someone who understands the structure and masters it.



Requirements include strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, proven experience in e-commerce video editing with a deep understanding of direct-response marketing, and a strong grasp of consumer psychology. You must understand how to trigger impulsive buying behavior, and be highly aware of metrics such as hook rate, CTR, retention, and conversion rate. Strong storytelling and pacing skills, branding awareness, and the ability to work quickly and efficiently under tight deadlines are essential. Full reliability for a consistent 40-hour work week schedule is required. You must think like a marketer, not just an editor. Metrics matter in this role.



Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a paid test edit based on a blueprint we provide. You will also participate in a one-week paid trial period to demonstrate your ability to meet performance and volume expectations. This process is designed to filter for high-level talent only.



This is a long-term position with consistent workload and growth opportunities inside a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.



To apply, submit your portfolio showcasing your best-performing e-commerce video ads, a Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why we should hire you along with your expertise in video editing, your WhatsApp contact information for communication, confirmation of your availability for full-time work (40 hours per week), and include “VELOCITY” in your
 subject line. Failure to follow these instructions will result in automatic disqualification.



If you are not confident in your ability to produce conversion-driven creatives at scale, do not apply. We are building a serious brand and we are hiring accordingly.

title: Client Onboarding Specialist
description:

The Onboarding Specialist is responsible for ensuring a smooth transition when a new association begins management services. Their tasks are front-loaded and focused on gathering, organizing, and setting up essential information for the Community Management Team for effective oversight. Onboarding responsibilities end once the setup tasks are completed, and the day-to-day management is fully transferred to the Property Manager (CAM) and Assistant Property Manager (ACAM).

- File Management: Store all onboarding files in SharePoint under the appropriate folder.

- Billing Oversight (First 2 Months): Ensure accurate receipt and processing of vendor bills.

- Post-Transition: Coordinate reserve transfers and close-out tasks. Enter homeowner balances, review final financials, and arrange delivery of physical assets. Special Projects: Support additional projects as assigned.

title: SharePoint / Microsoft 365 Expert
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



About the Organization 



EJF Real Estate Services and The Nabo Group are growing organizations focused on real estate investment and property/HOA management across multiple regions. Our operations rely heavily on structured document management, secure collaboration, and scalable systems to support property portfolios, boards, and internal teams. 



We are undergoing a transformation to modernize and standardize our Microsoft 365 environment, with a strong focus on SharePoint Online, governance, and operational efficiency. 



Overview 



We are seeking an experienced SharePoint & Microsoft 365 Architect to design and implement a scalable, secure, and governance-driven collaboration environment tailored to a multi-entity real estate and property management organization within the Corporate IT Department. 



This role will focus on building a structured and standardized environment across SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Microsoft Entra ID, enabling efficient document management, controlled access, and future-ready AI and automation capabilities. 



The ideal candidate is a strategic architect, not just an administrator, with experience designing environments that support distributed teams, regional operations, and complex permission models.



Duties & Responsibilities:



Architecture & Design:

 

•  Design enterprise-grade SharePoint Online architecture aligned to:  

 -  Properties / communities (HOAs)  

 -  Regions / portfolios  

 -  Internal departments (Finance, Operations, Legal, etc.)  

•  Implement a hub-and-spoke model with clear hierarchy and navigation  

•  Define scalable information architecture:  

 -  Metadata vs folder structures  

 -  Content types and taxonomy  

 -  Standardized document libraries  

•  Establish site provisioning models and templates for repeatable property onboarding  

•  Align SharePoint with Microsoft Teams and OneDrive usage patterns  



Governance & Compliance:

 

•  Develop and document a SharePoint governance framework tailored to property management operations:  

 -  Naming conventions (properties, regions, departments)  

 -  Site lifecycle management (onboarding/offboarding properties)  

 -  Permission models (board members, internal staff, vendors)  

•  Implement data governance and compliance controls:  

 -  Retention policies for property records and financial documents  

 -  Sensitivity labels and secure document handling  

 -  External sharing controls for board members and third parties  

•  Ensure alignment with real estate and property management operational needs  



Microsoft 365 Integration:  



•  Architect seamless integration across:  

 -  SharePoint Online  

 -  Microsoft Teams (for property and internal collaboration)  

 -  OneDrive (personal vs organizational data boundaries)  

 -  Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) 

•  Design scalable identity and access strategies:  

 -  Role-based access (internal staff, board members, vendors)  

 -  Group-based provisioning  

 -  Conditional access awareness  



Automation & AI Readiness:

 

•  Structure SharePoint for Microsoft Copilot readiness (clean, well-organized data)  

•  Identify opportunities for:  

 -  Power Automate workflows (approvals, document routing, onboarding)  

 -  Process automation for property management operations  

•  Improve search, discoverability, and document intelligence  



Migration & Optimization:



•  Assess current SharePoint and file storage environments  

•  Identify gaps, duplication, and inefficiencies  

•  Develop a migration and consolidation strategy  

•  Optimize usability for both:

title: Vendor Coordinator
description:
The Vendor Coordinator at The Nabo Group plays a vital role in managing and strengthening our vendor ecosystem. This position ensures that vendors are onboarded efficiently, remain compliant, and consistently deliver high-quality services to the communities we serve. Acting as the central liaison between vendors and internal teams, the Vendor Coordinator supports both Nabo Group and Nabo Services by managing vendor compliance, credentialing, communications, and financial coordination across platforms such as CINC Systems, VendorPay (AvidXchange), and VIVE.



Key Responsibilities:

Vendor Database & Systems Oversight

- Maintain accurate vendor records in CINC Systems, including contact details, addresses, compliance status, and payment preferences.

- Ensure VendorPay is set as the default payment method when appropriate, and support vendor setup for ACH and banking details.

- Monitor invoice routing and payment statuses; follow up on delayed or rejected transactions.

- Run reports (billing, refunds, processed payments) to monitor VendorPay adoption and billing accuracy.

- Conduct quarterly data audits across CINC, VIVE, and internal systems.



Vendor Onboarding & Compliance

- Manage end-to-end onboarding: W-9s, insurance, licenses, ACH forms, and portal training.

- Drive adoption of the VIVE platform for compliance and credentialing.

- Track and manage expirations of key documents; deliver compliance reports to leadership and Boards.

- Ensure vendors meet community-specific requirements such as COIs and background checks.



Vendor Relationship Management

- Act as the main point of contact for vendor inquiries related to compliance, payments, and documentation.

- Maintain strong relationships with VIP (Vendor Integrated Partners) and coordinate quarterly reviews.

- Proactively recruit and vet vendors in underrepresented categories or locations.

- Create and distribute vendor newsletters, compliance reminders, and event invitations.



Financial Coordination & Invoice Support

- Work with Accounting to configure vendor profiles and payment terms.

- Monitor daily activity in VendorPay; ensure timely and accurate invoice processing.

- Resolve vendor payment issues, including rejected payments, refund requests, and void/reissues.

- Prepare billing data for internal reporting and addendum billing processes.

- Educate Boards on vendor-related costs and compliance expenses.



Vendor Performance & Reporting

- Track vendor KPIs such as responsiveness, service quality, and invoice accuracy.

- Deliver monthly compliance and adoption reports to leadership.

- Support contract renewals and RFP processes by providing vendor scorecards.

- Identify opportunities to improve vendor programs and reduce operational costs.



Cross-Department Collaboration

- Partner with Property Managers to review and approve vendors for bids and RFPs.

- Collaborate with Accounting on reconciliation of payments, credits, and disputes.

- Work with Nabo Services on vendor scheduling and subcontractor management.

- Coordinate with Legal and Compliance on risk management and vendor agreements.



Qualifications:

- 2–3 years of experience in vendor coordination, procurement, or community/property management.

- Strong knowledge of vendor compliance requirements (e.g., insurance, licensing, W-9s).

- Familiarity with CINC Systems, VendorPay (AvidXchange), and VIVE is strongly preferred.

- Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build trusted vendor relationships.

- Proficient in data analysis, reporting, and performance tracking.

- Proactive problem-solver with a customer service mindset.



Working Conditions:

- Remote Work: 100% remote—work from anywhere.

- Monitoring: Use of time-tracking software (Hubstaff) is required.

title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Social Media Content Producer *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Producer to own the daily execution, publishing, and production operations behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the hands-on execution role on the social team. You take creative direction and turn it into finished, polished, published content - fast, clean, and on-brand, every single day.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You report to the Content Strategist who sets the creative direction and generates the ideas. Your job is to bring those ideas to life - editing, designing, scheduling, publishing, tracking performance, and keeping the entire production machine running smoothly.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented executor who can produce high-quality short-form content at volume, manage publishing workflows across multiple platforms, and actively use AI tools to increase speed and output. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Produce 2 to 3 short-form videos and supporting graphics per day, including editing, trimming, captioning, and polishing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Execute on creative briefs and direction provided by the Content Strategist, turning concepts into finished, platform-ready assets.

- Design on-brand visuals such as carousels, text graphics, thumbnails, and infographics that support the creator's style and messaging.

- Plan, schedule, and publish short-form content across all platforms while maintaining a balanced mix of educational, inspirational, and trend-based formats.

- Follow short-form trends including audio, hooks, captions, and editing styles, and flag relevant opportunities to the Content Strategist.

- Monitor performance metrics weekly and provide insights, recommendations, and data summaries based on watch time, retention, views, and engagement.

- Source and organize trending sounds, audio, and reference content to support the Content Strategist's ideation process.

- Coordinate collaboration posts and identify smart opportunities for creator crossovers and partnership content.

- Keep systems clean in Asana and Google Drive, ensuring clear task ownership, file naming, version control, and a predictable content runway.

- Use AI tools to streamline editing, captioning, clipping, and repurposing workflows to increase daily output and reduce turnaround time.

- Continuously improve and document production workflows to increase the efficiency and scalability of the content system.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience creating and publishing short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube Shorts with proven results.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and have an eye for what looks premium.

- Editing and design expertise in short-form video editing using Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut, and strong design ability using Canva or Photoshop, including thumbnails, carousels, text graphics, and supporting visuals.

- Strong ability to take creative direction and execute it accurately and quickly with minimal revision cycles.

- Deep platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats, with a clear understanding of distribution mechanics and platform culture.

- Experience managing posting schedules and publishing workflows across multiple platforms, with strong attention to detail, file organization, and systems management.

- Ability to track and interpret performance metrics such as watch time, retention, views, and engagement, and surface insights to inform strategy.

- AI-forward operator who actively uses AI tools in editing and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with the Content Strategist, editors, and cross-functional teams.

- Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively while operating in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating editing, design, and creative execution across multiple short-form formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- Social content consistently published within 24 to 48 hours of long-form production wrap.

- Sustained growth in high-quality engagement including shares, saves, retention, and audience sentiment.

- A cohesive, premium social presence that reinforces and amplifies the creator's broader ecosystem.

- Clean, organized production systems with predictable output and minimal missed deadlines.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of video editing.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.

title: COO / Operations Integrator for High-Volume Dropshipping System
description:
Compensation & Incentives first month probationary period. (100 dollar increase to base everymonth thereafter)

This role is designed for someone who wants to prove themselves and earn based on performance.



Apply here: 



Base Retainer: $50 USD / week (Guaranteed for meeting minimum responsibilities).



Performance Bonus: $200 USD for every store that validates.





The Opportunity

I am building a data-driven, high-volume product validation machine, and I am looking for a COO-style Operations Integrator to own the execution.



We run a lean, volume-first testing model. We don’t test 3–5 products a month; we test 40–50. We use a structured multi-phase framework (P1 ? P2 ? P3) with clear gates, risk caps, and kill rules.



The machine is built. We need someone to fly it.



You will be the bridge between the founder and the specialist pods (research, creatives, media buying, sourcing). Your job is simple to define but hard to execute: Turn a proven validation model into a predictable, weekly execution rhythm.



Who You Are

You are NOT a VA ticking boxes. You are an operator.



You are an "Integrator": You are the calm operations brain that turns strategy into checklists, timelines, and ownership.



You think in systems: You naturally map how work moves from A ? B ? C and lock in that path.



You are data-literate: You don’t need to be a data scientist, but you can look at a report and instantly say, “We should kill this” or “We should keep testing this.”



You love upside: You prefer a role where your income scales with your results, rather than a flat hourly rate.



Core Responsibilities

You will own the day-to-day orchestration of the entire validation machine.



1. Pipeline & Capacity Management



Maintain a clear product pipeline: Idea ? Ready to Test ? P1 ? P2 ? P3 ? Scale.



Ensure we always have enough products in staging to hit our 40–50/month target.



Balance team capacity so researchers, creatives, and media buyers are never idle but never overloaded.



2. Process & SOP Execution



Enforce the 3-phase gate system. Ensure every product has the required assets before launch.



Confirm kill rules and budgets are respected (prevent emotional overspend).



Create and refine SOPs: Research handoffs, creative briefs, and media buying logging.



3. Cross-Team Coordination



Run regular check-ins with Research, Creative, and Media Buying pods.



Remove bottlenecks fast: If creatives are delayed, you escalate. If a buyer hasn’t launched, you chase. If quality drops, you reset expectations.



4. Systems & Data Hygiene



Create and own the Notion / ClickUp / Sheets structure as the single source of truth.



Maintain clean data for Products, Creatives, and Adsets so we can track validation rates and calculate bonuses accurately.



5. Continuous Improvement



Spot inefficiencies (e.g., "We need a better creative brief") and implement fixes.



Refine the validation model over time based on real results, not theory.



Requirements

2+ Years Experience: Operations, Project Management, or Integrator roles (ideally in E-commerce/Dropshipping).



Remote Team Management: Experience coordinating different pods (researchers, editors, media buyers).



Tech Stack: Strong proficiency in Notion, ClickUp/Asana, Google Sheets, and Slack.



Marketing Knowledge: Familiarity with ROAS, CPA, and AOV (you don’t need to be a media buyer, but you must speak the language).



Communication: Strong written English and relentless follow-through.



Definition: A store validates when it passes our internal criteria and moves into proper scaling.



The Upside: Since we test 40–50 products a month, the validation volume is significantly higher than low-volume models. If you run the system well, multiple validations per month are realistic, meaning your bonus will quickly outgrow the base.



Growth: As the system proves itself, we are open to discussing higher base pay and deeper profit-share arrangements.



How to Apply

Read this carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.



Step 1: Review the full application details here:



Join 
 Application Channel



View Role Details on Notion



Step 2: Submit your proposal with the following:



Attention to Detail: Include the word “Integrator” somewhere in the first sentence of your proposal.



Experience: Share 1–2 specific examples where you acted as an integrator/ops manager in e-commerce. What was the monthly product or campaign volume?



Systems: Describe one system or workflow you built that made a tea
aningfully more efficient. What tools did you use? How did you measure improvement?



Scenario: If you joined tomorrow and we needed to reliably test 40–50 products per month, how would you structure the pipeline, communication, and weekly check-ins?



Confirmation: Confirm you understand and accept the compensation structure (Base + Performance Bonus).

title: Product Research Specialist – Fashion Dropshipping
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce/dropshipping company with 5 active stores on Meta and TikTok, now expanding to Google Stores. To support our growth, we are looking for a Product Research Specialist — someone who can spot winning products, analyze trends, and work in a structured way to keep our stores ahead of the competition.



Your Role



As our Product Research Specialist, you will research and identify trending, high-potential products by analyzing competitor ads, market trends, and performance data. You will also work in an organized way to track and manage multiple stores (Google, Meta, TikTok), ensuring that product opportunities are quickly spotted and acted upon.



What You’ll Do



– Research and identify winning products for Google, Meta, and TikTok stores



– Use tools such as
 Ads Library, KoalaData, TikTok Ad Manager, and Google for product and market analysis



– Track product performance across multiple stores in a structured way



– Spot trends early and evaluate product potential with data-driven insights



– Provide clear reports and recommendations to the team



– Collaborate with the product listing and marketing teams to align research with campaigns



What We’re Looking For



– Proven experience in product research for dropshipping



– Familiarity with research tools:
 Ads Library, KoalaData, TikTok Ad Manager, Google



– Strong organizational skills to track and oversee multiple stores



– Analytical, detail-oriented, and proactive mindset



– Full-time availability and eagerness to grow with the company



Why Join Us



– Play a key role in discovering winning products that drive our sales growth



– Join a young, ambitious, and scaling company



– Dynamic work environment where your insights matter



– Opportunities to grow and bring in your own ideas

title: Social Media Manager & Creator Partnerships
description:
We are a European lingerie brand. Our creative team is the engine behind our growth — consisting of a media buyer, video editor, and creative strategist. You will be the fourth piece of the puzzle: the social media manager who runs our creator pipeline and online presence.



This is not a support role. This is a key position in our revenue engine. The creative department is the main revenue driver of the business, which means this comes with real responsibility. We expect it to be done right.





Before you apply — read this carefully:

- If you want a real shot at this role and want to be taken seriously: record a short intro video of 1-2 minutes. Tell us who you are, what you do, and walk us through your relevant experience. Send it along with your application.

- During the hiring call we will ask targeted questions to verify that you actually have the experience you claim. We will ask for concrete examples and results. Please do not waste your time or ours if the experience is not there.





What you will be doing:

- Sourcing creators that fit our brand and target audience — via Instagram, TikTok, and other channels

- Setting up, negotiating, and closing collaboration contracts with creators — including persuading creators to agree to deals that work in our favor

- Managing and maintaining relationships with creators: sending briefings, following up on content, building long-term partnerships

- Managing our social media channels: planning and publishing posts, creating and posting stories, producing and publishing reels, and responding to DMs and comments

- Spotting opportunities and coming up with ideas and improvements on your own — without being asked

- Communicating quickly and proactively within the team — being unreachable for extended periods is not an option





What we expect from you:

- At least 2 years of proven experience in a similar role — preferably in e-commerce or fashion/lifestyle

- Strong command of English, both spoken and written — this is our working language

- A professional work setup with fast internet and minimal distractions so you can fully focus

- You work well alongside A-players who hold high standards and hold yourself to the same

- You are available for the long term and see this as a serious career move, not a side job





Your place in the team:

You will be part of our creative department — the team directly responsible for our revenue. The department consists of:

- Media buyer

- Video editor

- Creative strategist

- You — Social Media Manager & Creator Partnerships





What we offer

- A long-term position at our lingerie brand — we are not looking for someone temporary

- Fair and competitive compensation — if you deliver real value and contribute to the business, you will be paid well for it

- Location independent — work from wherever you want, as long as you are available and reachable during working hours

title: Landscape Architect
description:
We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Licensed Landscape Architect with at least 5 years of experience to join our design team. The ideal candidate will blend technical precision with creative flair, overseeing the development of comprehensive site plans that integrate complex hardscape features, aquatic elements, and regional horticulture.



This role requires a professional who is as comfortable navigating government zoning regulations as they are designing a custom fountain or selecting the perfect palette of Florida-native vegetation. You will be responsible for managing projects from initial concept through detailed construction documentation, ensuring every design is both beautiful and buildable.



Position Requirements:



* Degree in Landscape Architecture

* In-depth experience designing and preparing site plans and landscape/hardscape plans

* Ability to review and apply government regulations

* Knowledge and experience with hardscape and construction details

* Experience with hardscape materials, pools, and fountain design

* Knowledge of Florida vegetation and growing conditions

* Strong AutoCAD, Microsoft (Word and Excel) skills

* Working knowledge of graphic software programs (Adobe Photoshop, Sketchup, and

PowerPoint)

* Ability to manage multiple priorities

* Work samples

* Positive attitude and Proven ability to meet rigid project deadlines.

* Minimum Experience: 5 years

* Minimum Education Level: Bachelor’s Degree

* Required Major: Landscape Architecture





Desired Qualifications:

* Self-motivated

* Detail oriented

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
Do you look at a manual, repetitive task and think, "There’s an API for that"?



We are looking for a brilliant AI Automation Specialist to help us move at the speed of light. This isn't just a technical role; it’s a creative one. You will be the architect of our digital nervous system—connecting our tools, automating our workflows, and layering in AI to make our team 10x more efficient.



The Mission

Your goal is to eliminate friction. You’ll audit our current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and build automated solutions that allow our humans to focus on high-level strategy while your bots handle the rest.



What You’ll Own:

* Workflow Engineering: Designing and maintaining sophisticated automations (using tools like Zapier, Make/Integromat, or custom scripts).

* AI Integration: Implementing LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and AI tools into our daily operations to enhance content, data analysis, and customer touchpoints.

* System Audits: Constantly looking for "waste" in our processes and proposing automated fixes.

* Database Management: Ensuring data flows seamlessly and accurately between our CRM, project management tools, and communication channels.

* Troubleshooting: Being the first responder when a "zap" breaks or an API changes.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Logic Master: You understand "If This, Then That" logic at an advanced level.

* The AI Early Adopter: You aren't just using ChatGPT for
s; you’re building with it. You understand prompt engineering and how to connect AI to external data.

* The Problem Solver: You don’t wait for instructions. You see a broken process and you fix it.

* The Communicator: You can explain a complex automation to a non-tech tea
mber so they understand the value.



Why Join Us?

We don't want a "yes-person." We want a builder. If you have a better way to do things, we’ll give you the tools and the autonomy to build it. Help us define what the future of our firm looks like.



Ready to build the future with us?

Don't just send a resume—show us what you can automate. Start by filling out our application form here:

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Data-Driven Bookkeeper | Turn Numbers into Strategy



Are you a numbers wizard who sees the story behind the spreadsheets? We aren’t just looking for someone to "balance the books"—we need a Financial & KPI Specialist who loves precision and thrives on data-informed growth.



If you enjoy reconciling accounts as much as you enjoy building a performance dashboard that reveals the "why" behind the numbers, we want to talk to you.



The Mission

Your role is twofold: Keeping our financial foundation rock-solid. You’ll be the person who alerts us to trends before they become problems and celebrates wins with hard data.



What You’ll Own:

* The Ledger: Flawless management of AR/AP, bank reconciliations, and transaction monitoring.

* The Dashboard: Tracking, analyzing, and reporting on financial and departmental KPIs. You’ll turn raw data into visual insights.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Experience: You have a proven track record in bookkeeping, but you also have a "data analyst" mindset.

* The Tech Savvy: You’re comfortable navigating accounting software and possess advanced skills in reporting tools/dashboards.

* The Eye for Detail: You spot a $0.01 discrepancy from a mile away and notice when a KPI trend looks "off."

* The Communicator: You can explain financial variances to non-finance people without losing them in the jargon.



Why Join Us?

We value transparency, efficiency, and the insights you bring to the table. This isn't just about data entry; it’s about having a seat at the table in how we measure success.



Ready to apply?

We’ve ditched the long-winded
 process. Please jump over to our application form here:
