title: Medical & Executive Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
We're seeking an experienced Medical VA or a Filipino Nurse with administrative expertise to support our growing wellness practice. This unique position combines medical knowledge with executive administrative skills, supporting both clinical operations and practice management. You'll work directly with our provider and team to ensure seamless patient care coordination while managing critical administrative and marketing functions.



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys the administrative and organizational side of healthcare, wants to leverage their medical background in a virtual capacity, and is looking for stable, long-term growth with a supportive wellness practice.

Important: This position requires Medical VA Experience, HIPAA certification training, and proficiency with Charm EHR.



Your Core Responsibilities:

Clinical Administrative Support

You'll prepare and manage patient handouts after appointment visits, coordinate schedule reviews and appointment management, and maintain patient records in our Charm EHR system with HIPAA compliance. You'll handle patient communications via phone and
 when needed and support clinical workflow optimization. Experience navigating Charm EHR efficiently is essential as you'll be working in this system daily to document patient encounters, manage treatment plans, and ensure accurate medical recordkeeping.



Executive & Practice Management

EHR Administration: Use Charm EHR system to provide patient educational materials, and keep patient records updated and accurate.

Calendar & Scheduling: Manage provider availability, coordinate patient appointments, send reminders, and ensure smooth daily operations.

Coordinate therapy and wellness appointments: send pre/post-care instructions, and track lab results/referrals.

Provide general admin and provider support: including inbox management, reminders, and simple reporting.



Process & Growth

Identify opportunities to streamline clinical and administrative workflows in our wellness practice. Suggest improvements to patient experience and practice efficiency. Take initiative on projects that enhance practice operations and help grow our client base.



Schedule & Commitment

Starting hours: 20 hours per week

Growth path: Clear progression to full-time (40 hours/week)

Core availability required: Flexible Schedule but must be available on 3pm-7pm Pacific Time (to start)

Meetings/Training: Availability for scheduled onboarding, training sessions, and tea
etings during Pacific Time business hours



Required Qualifications

Essential Requirements

HIPAA Training certification

Charm EHR experience (REQUIRED) - Must have hands-on experience with Charm's patient management, charting, and documentation features

Reliable internet connection and professional and private home office setup

Excellent verbal English communication for phone interactions with patients and clients

Strong organizational skills with exceptional attention to detail



Professional Qualities

Self-motivated learner who can independently research and master new tools

Takes initiative and proactively identifies tasks and solutions

Able to work independently with minimal supervision once trained

Detail-oriented with commitment to accuracy, especially in medical records

Professional, responsive, and committed to quality work

Comfortable managing multiple priorities simultaneously

Understanding of wellness, aesthetic, and preventive care concepts



Why Join Our Team?

Stable Growth: Clear path from part-time to full-time as our wellness practice expands

Flexible Schedule: Work hours that fit your life (outside required core hours)

Diverse Responsibilities: Use both your nursing background and admin skills daily in an exciting wellness environment

Supportive Environment: Work with a healthcare team led by an experienced APRN that values your contributions

Skill Development: Expand your expertise across clinical admin, marketing, wellness education, and practice management

Performance Recognition: Compensation increases tied to your proven value

Long-term Career: We're building for the future and want you to grow with us

Remote Flexibility: Work from home with a supportive, communicative team

Exciting Industry: Be part of the growing wellness, hormone optimization, and aesthetic medicine field



Compensation & Benefits

Hourly Rate: $6.50-$9/hour (based on experience)

Starting Hours: 20 hours per week

Growth Potential: Progress to 40 hours/week as your capabilities grow

Performance Bonuses: Opportunities for bonuses tied to practice growth and efficiency improvements

Hour Increases: Performance-based hour increases as you demonstrate value

Skill-Building: Continuous learning opportunities across multiple platforms and wellness industry knowledge



How to Apply

Change the subject line to: "Ready to Support Vital Wellness – [What U.S. law protects patient health information?]"

Answer the following questions (label your answers clearly):

(1) Interest & Fit (No more than 3 sentences)

Explain why you are interested in this Medical/Executive Admin VA role and what makes you a strong fit for a wellness and aesthetic practice. Share what motivates you about supporting both clinical and administrative operations.

(2) Clinical Background & Charm EHR Experience (3–5 sentences)

Provide a brief summary of your nursing or clinical background and any Medical VA experience. Describe your hands-on experience with Charm EHR—the features you’ve used, tasks you’ve handled, and how long you’ve worked with the system. Include any relevant experience in wellness, IV therapy, hormone therapy, or aesthetic medicine.

(3) Technical Skills (bullet points)

List the major software tools and platforms you are proficient in (scheduling systems, EMRs, communication tools, etc.). If you have experience with Charm EHR, make sure it appears clearly in your list.



Applications must follow this exact format to be considered. Your application will not be considered if you do not follow instructions exactly. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video interview to discuss experience, learning style, and cultural fit with our team.

title: Sales Admin
description:
Sales Operations Admin | The Engine Behind Our Revenue



Are you the kind of person who gets a dopamine hit from a perfectly organized CRM? Do you believe that a salesperson is only as good as the lead data and follow-up systems supporting them?



We are looking for a Sales Admin who doesn't just "input data" but actively manages the flow of our sales pipeline. You are the air traffic controller for our deals, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks and every lead is handled with precision.



The Mission

Your goal is simple: Maximize the sales team’s selling time. You’ll handle the logistics, the documentation, and the CRM hygiene so our consultants can focus on conversations. You are the "closer's" secret weapon.



What You’ll Own:

* CRM Mastery: Maintaining a spotless database, no duplicate leads, no expired tasks, no missing tags.

* Lead Logistics: Qualifying incoming leads, assigning them to the right reps, and ensuring lightning-fast response times.

* Sales Support: Drafting proposals, sending out contracts, and managing the e-signature process (DocuSign/PandaDoc).

* Calendar Management: Coordinating high-stakes discovery calls and ensuring both the prospect and the rep are prepared.

* Reporting: Providing weekly snapshots of the pipeline—tracking win rates, lead sources, and "stalled" deals.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Gatekeeper: You are obsessed with accuracy and follow-through. If a lead hasn't been touched in 24 hours, it bothers you.

* The CRM Expert: You don't just use a CRM; you understand how to optimize it for better workflows.

* The Professional Voice: You have excellent written English. You can draft a follow-up
 that is polite, persistent, and professional.

* The Multitasker: You can jump from an urgent contract edit to a lead-routing task without losing your rhythm.

* The Proactive Partner: You don't wait for a rep to ask for help; you see the bottleneck in the pipeline and clear it.



Why Join Us?

When the sales team wins, you win. We recognize that the "back office" of sales is what actually builds a company. You’ll be a core part of our growth engine, not just a support staff member.



Ready to help us scale?

We value speed and attention to detail. Show us yours by completing our application form here:

title: E-commerce Product Specialist
description:
We operate three established and profitable e-commerce stores and are expanding our team to support growth and product excellence. We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented E-commerce Product Specialist who can manage product listings, perform web scraping, and help optimize our Shopify stores.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities -

• Manage and maintain product information across all stores: uploading new products, updating listings, and maintaining vendor databases.

• Coordinate with vendors to gather accurate product information, lead times, and order details.

• Research products and competitors to identify new opportunities and monitor performance metrics.

• Optimize Shopify listings for product rankings, conversion rates, and sales growth.

• Perform mass uploads and bulk changes to products efficiently.

• Quality-check product images, titles, descriptions, and specifications for accuracy.

• Collaborate with the team to resolve product and website issues promptly.

• Oversee inventory reconciliation and track stock levels.

• Document SOPs, maintain records of product performance, and suggest process improvements.

• Complete daily administrative tasks, including reports, logs, and operational updates.

• Manage assigned tasks proactively and independently, without needing follow-ups or reminders.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years of Product Management or Product Specialist experience in an e-commerce environment.

• Proven hands-on experience with Shopify (being Shopify Certified is a plus).

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).

• Comfortable handling multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment.



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency with Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, Google Workspace, and web scraping tools.

• Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills.

• A reliable computer and at least 20 Mbps internet connection.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed: takes initiative, owns tasks, and solves problems independently.

• Process-minded: documents and refines workflows naturally.

• Detail-oriented: accuracy is a priority.

• Customer-focused: product issues and feedback are opportunities to improve systems.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



This Role Won’t Be a Match If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists.

• You cannot work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently.

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions.

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities.



Before You Apply – Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a one-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

  a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

  b) What issues did you run into?

  c) Anything you need help with?



If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.

Application Instructions (Follow Exactly)

Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your Product Specialist

Example: Kevin – I Am Your Product Specialist



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

• What is your previous experience with managing products for e-commerce companies?

• List the tools/software you’ve used for product management, including web scraping, bulk uploads, or analytics, and explain how you applied them.

• Have you worked with Shopify before? Please describe your tasks.

• Are you currently engaged in another job or commitment?

• How fast is your internet (include a screenshot)?

• Do you have a reliable computer? Please share specs.

• How often do you experience power or internet outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for power outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for internet outages?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We are looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

title: AI-Powered Video Editor (Direct Response & E-com Ads)
description:
## Job Title: Fast Video Editor for Ecom Ads (AI Tools Required)



### About the Role



We are a fast-growing DTC brand in the Kids / Education space, and we produce a lot of ads every week.



We believe **creative volume = revenue**, so we are looking for a fast editor who can help us run our Ad Factory.



This is not a slow editing job.

We need someone who can produce ads every day using AI tools and work independently.



If you are slow, this job is not for you.

If you are fast and consistent, this can be a long-term job.



---



### Your Daily Goal



* Produce around **5 minutes of finished footage per day**

* This can include:



  * VSL edits

  * UGC ads

  * Hook variations

  * Short ad variations



You must be able to:



* Deliver drafts in 24–48 hours

* Generate your own clips using AI tools

* Generate AI voiceovers

* Add captions

* Follow example ads exactly

* Work without being spoon-fed



We care about **ads that convert**, not cinematic editing.



---



### Important — AI Clip Generation (No B-Roll Needed)



You do NOT need to find stock footage.



You will generate clips yourself using AI tools such as:



* HeyGen

* Veo

* Kling

* Nanobanana / image-to-video tools

* ElevenLabs (voice)

* CapCut / Premiere / After Effects



You must have experience with **at least 2 of these AI tools**.



This job is for fast AI editors, not traditional editors.



---



### Requirements



* Experience with E-commerce / Direct Response ads

* Experience with at least 2 AI tools listed above

* Can work fast every day

* Can send daily updates on 

* Looking for long-term work

* Can follow instructions exactly



---



### Pay



* $1,000 USD per month

* Paid weekly ($250/week)

* Bonuses for winning ads



This is a long-term position.

Strong editors will be promoted to **Senior Editor**, and top performers can grow into a **Creative Strategist role with performance-based pay and bonuses**.



We reward people who help us create winning ads and scale the brand.



---



### Trial Process (Read Carefully)



Step 1 — Unpaid Test

You will make **one 30-second video**



You must:



* Copy our example video 1:1

* We give you the script

* Script will be slightly different

* Same style, pacing, and format



This is to test your speed and accuracy.



Step 2 — Paid Trial ($30)

If your test is good, you will do a paid trial and receive **$30 for the trial edit**.



Step 3 — Hire

If the paid trial is good, you will be hired full-time.



---



### How to Apply



Start your message with:



**CUSTOMER FIRST**



Then send:



1. Portfolio (Ecom ads only)

2. List of AI tools you use

3. Confirm you can make 5 minutes of footage per day

4. Confirm you are ok with $1,000/month + bonus

5. Confirm you are ready to start the test



If you are ready, write:



**CUSTOMER FIRST — READY FOR TEST**



Applications without this will be ignored.

title: AI-Powered Video Editor (Direct Response & E-com Ads)
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-scaling DTC brand group in the Kids and Education space. We believe that creative volume is the #1 driver of revenue, and we are looking for a "beast" of an editor who can keep our "Ad Factory" running.



This is a high-volume, output-based role. We aren't looking for someone to work "hours"—we are looking for someone to deliver results. You must be an AI-forward editor who uses modern tools (ElevenLabs, Midjourney, AI Video, etc.) to produce high-energy, high-converting ads at a pace that traditional editors can't match.



The Mission: High-Volume Output

Daily Goal: Deliver approximately 5 minutes of finished, high-quality footage every day (this includes VSLs, UGC mashups, and multiple hook variations).



Speed: First drafts must be delivered within 24–48 hours.



Independence: You source your own B-roll, generate your own AI voiceovers, and handle assets without being spoon-fed.

Requirements

E-com Portfolio: Mandatory experience with Direct Response ads.



Communication: You must be available for daily updates via 
.

Compensation & Incentives

Performance Bonuses: We reward winners. You will receive cash bonuses for every "Winning Ad" you create that hits our scaling targets.



Trial Process: Top candidates will do a paid test edit ($20). Finalists move to a 2-week paid trial.



Growth: As the brand scales, your role and compensation have the potential to grow with us.

title: Full-Time Funnel Expert
description:
About Us

We are a global tech company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time in history since the invention of banking, customers – not banks – can have full ownership of their money.

. Thanks to our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized technology, companies can work internationally with no risk of payment delays, and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banks.

. Workers can remit funds to their loved ones at almost no cost.

. And two billion unbanked can become financially independent.

We are not just building the future of finance. We can make a real difference.

We have validated the vision and secured the capital from both recurring revenues and a seed round. Now, we are leveling up our leadership.



Why Your Role Matters

As our Funnel Expert, you are the engine behind turning interest into action. You will work directly with one of the top funnel experts in the region, one of our founders, who has successfully created funnels generating billions of dollars in sales. Your support is essential to maximize his time and execute his strategies (and boost your personal knowledge in the process).



Unique Benefit

You will work directly with one of the founders, one of the top funnel experts in the region, who has generated billions of dollars in sales and has made multiple exits. This level of mentorship and exposure is rare and a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.



Key Responsibilities

- Design and optimize end-to-end user funnels — from awareness to conversion and retention.

- Conduct deep funnel analysis using quantitative and qualitative data.

- Run experiments to improve conversion rates and remove friction points.

- Implement and refine tracking, analytics, and instrumentation for funnel metrics.

- Collaborate with Growth, Product, Marketing, and Data teams to align funnel strategies.

- Identify bottlenecks and recommend data-backed improvements.

- Continuously measure and report on funnel performance and outcomes.



Skills & Experience

- Proven experience optimizing user funnels in digital products.

- Strong analytical skills and hands-on experience with data and analytics tools (Mixpanel, GA4, Amplitude, etc.)

- Track record of driving measurable improvements in conversion and engagement.

- Comfortable collaborating with cross-functional teams.

title: Appointment Setter for US B2B Company
description:
We’re hiring an experienced sales development representative to support outbound sales for US-based clients.



This is a full-time role (40 hours/week, US business hours).



What you’ll be doing:

• Outbound prospecting via cold calls,
 sequences, and LinkedIn outreach

• Qualifying inbound and outbound leads before passing to the closer

• Managing your pipeline in the CRM (updating stages, logging activity, scheduling follow-ups)

• Building and cleaning lead lists using tools like Apollo, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or 

• Writing and sending personalized outreach
s (not templates copy-pasted to 500 people)

• Booking qualified meetings for the sales team

• Reporting on daily/weekly activity: dials,
s sent, connects, meetings booked



You need to have:

• At least 1 year of outbound sales experience for a US company (not just inbound lead handling)

• Clear, confident spoken English (you will be on calls with US prospects)

• Experience with a CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, Pipedrive, or Close)

• Experience with at least one outbound tool (Apollo, Instantly, Lemlist, Woodpecker, or similar)

• Experience with a power dialer or calling tool (Mojo, PhoneBurner, Aloware, OpenPhone, or similar)

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

• Available to work US business hours



Nice to have:

• Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for prospecting

• Experience in home services, SaaS, insurance, solar, or real estate verticals

• Track record you can describe in numbers (dials/day, meetings/week, pipeline generated)

• GoHighLevel experience (workflows, automations, pipeline management)



Rate:

$5–7/hr USD depending on experience



To apply (IMPORTANT — read carefully):



Answer these two questions (keep it short, a few sentences each):

1. What was the most annoying part of your last outbound sales job? Not the hardest part — the most repetitive or frustrating thing you had to deal with regularly.

2. What CRM and dialer were you using, and roughly how many contacts were in the pipeline you were managing?



Applications that don’t answer both questions will be skipped.

title: Contact Database Management Assistant
description:
Role Overview

This role supports our leadership, operations, and marketing teams by owning the behind-the-scenes systems that keep our training, community, and client experience running smoothly. Your work ensures our CRM and automations stay healthy, the contact info we have across all our databases is accurate and categorized correctly, and our leaders stay visible and engaged with our audience across multiple platforms.



CRM Management

-Format and import incoming agent databases to merge accurately into our overall contact system (done first in spreadsheets)

-Isolate and export offboarded agent databases and accurately re-route existing leads

-Sync contacts between CRM and marketing systems

-Maintain overall database health



Paid Lead List Requests

-Completing incoming agent requests for circle prospecting and other paid lead lists

-Scrubbing against our existing database to remove duplicates

-Importing to MOJO dialer for agents



Recruiting CRM Management

-Ensure health of our recruiting database in GHL

-Scrub incoming data against existing contact records



Tools You’ll Use Daily

Asana

Google Sheets

Follow-Up Boss

HighLevel (GHL)

Slack

Social Platforms

Google Workspace





Ideal Candidate Skills

-Obsession with data accuracy (we need to trust that the person who manages all this client contact info formats it faithfully, accurately merges and imports / exports, and proactively reports issues)

-Strong attention to detail and ability to follow existing systems and workflows

-Confident working inside CRMs and spreadsheets including merging sheets, finding and removing duplicates, scrubbing for bad data, and using formulas to fill data gaps

-Tech-comfortable and quick to learn new software platforms

-Highly organized, with the ability to manage recurring daily/weekly tasks reliably

-Proactive, dependable, and responsive—especially in remote/asynchronous environments

title: Meta Paid Ads Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Meta Paid Ads Specialist – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there? 

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job? 

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now? 

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?



Keywords

 ads,
 ads specialist,
 ads manager,
 advertising, meta ads, meta ads specialist, meta ads manager, meta ads buyer, fb ads manager, media buyer,
 media buyer, paid ads buyer, performance marketer, performance ads, digital advertising, digital marketing, online advertising, social media advertising, ecommerce ads, google ads, DTC, DTC ads, pmax ads, pmax campaigns, performance max, youtube, tiktok, pinterest, ads specialist, ads buyer, ads manager, ads strategist, brand strategist, ads manager, growth marketer, CRO specialist, shopify

title: OPERATIONS MANAGER – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a fast-growing travel and expedition company based in El Nido, Palawan, operating daily tours, private expeditions, and multi-day experiences for international clients.



Our operations involve boats, drivers, guides, logistics teams, and multiple on-site partners, across El Nido, Coron, and Puerto Princesa.



We are now looking for a strong, hands-on Operations Manager to act as the founder’s right hand on the ground - someone who can supervise teams, enforce standards, detect issues early, and ensure operations run reliably every day.



This is not a remote role. This is a field-based leadership position.



OPERATIONS MANAGER – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)

(Field Operations Lead / Founder’s Right Hand)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Supervise daily operations across tours, logistics, and field teams (boats, drivers, guides, coordination staff)

• Be physically present on the ground to monitor execution, verify standards, and detect issues early

• Ensure all bookings, operations data, and reporting are accurate, complete, and reliable

• Identify operational dysfunctions (delays, inconsistencies, poor coordination, missing information) and resolve them quickly

• Detect and address irregularities, leakages, or potential fraud (cash handling, supplier discrepancies, internal shortcuts, etc.)

• Enforce discipline, accountability, and high standards across all teams

• Coordinate with partners and suppliers to ensure smooth and reliable service delivery

• Implement and improve processes, SOPs, and operational structure as the company grows

• Support team leaders, train staff, and ensure alignment across all locations

• Report directly to the founder and act as his eyes and ears on the ground



WHAT YOU BRING



• 5+ years experience in operations within tourism or hospitality (resorts, hotels, tour operators, transport/logistics, marine or fleet operations)

• Proven experience managing on-site teams (not remote) in real operational environments

• Strong ability to enforce rules, maintain discipline, and handle difficult situations

• Experience dealing with operational issues, staff misconduct, or fraud situations

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, imperfect, real-world environment

• Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

• Fluent in English, and comfortable working with both local teams and international clients

• Willing to be based in El Nido and travel regularly to Coron and Puerto Princesa



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is for someone who is:



• Hands-on and field-oriented — not just behind a computer

• Detail-oriented and highly observant

• Comfortable confronting issues directly and taking decisions

• Able to manage people, not just processes

• Reliable, structured, and consistent in execution

• Looking for a long-term role with responsibility and impact



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Standards matter.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:



If you were responsible for supervising operations in a travel company, what types of dysfunctions or irregularities would you watch for?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



IMPORTANT



• This role is based in El Nido, Palawan

• This is not a remote position

• Experience in tourism, hospitality, or field operations is required

• Candidates without relevant on-site operational experience will not be considered



WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT



• Key leadership role working directly with the founder

• High level of responsibility and autonomy

• Opportunity to structure and scale real-world operations

• Dynamic, international environment in one of the most beautiful locations in the Philippines

• Strong impact on the growth and performance of the company



LOCATION



El Nido, Palawan

Regular travel to Coron and Puerto Princesa

title: TikTok Video Editor for VIRAL AI Health/Food Faceless Channels
description:
We're building an AI-first calorie tracking iOS app and running 3 faceless TikTok channels to drive organic installs. We're looking for one person to fully own this from zero to scale. Not just an editor. Not just a growth person. Both.



We have one internal tool that handles video generation. Everything else is on you: researching daily trends in the health and wellness niche, writing hooks, d
 content angles, selecting sounds, adding captions and text overlays, optimizing pacing, managing account warmup, scheduling posts, tracking performance, and iterating based on what the data tells you. You are the creative brain and the operator. If the numbers aren't moving, that's on you to diagnose and fix.



This is not a manual content grind. You'll work within a proven playbook with room to optimize and iterate. Minimum 2 videos per day per account at full scale across all 3 channels.



We're looking for someone who genuinely lives on TikTok, understands what performs in health and wellness right now, and has a real track record of growing accounts, not just editing videos.



Beginners will not be considered.

The pay is structured to reward performance. Base pay reaches $1,500+/month at full scale, with an uncapped bonus of $25 per video that hits 100k+ organic views. Strong performers earn well above base.



To apply, start your message with the letter X. Include: (1) a link to one TikTok account you currently manage and what results you've driven, and (2) one before/after example of raw input versus final edited video you delivered. Generic applications will not be considered.

title: CREATIVE STRATEGIST (with VIDEO EDITING BACKGROUND)
description:
We’re looking for a Creative Strategist with a strong video editing background to develop high-performing creative concepts for paid social. This role blends strategy, research, copywriting, and hands-on editing, working closely with our Growth and Creative teams to translate insights into ads that convert.



Compensation:

$1,500 – $2,500/month (depending on experience and performance)

performance-based incentives (to be discussed)



You must be able to produce performance-driven video & image ads, craft compelling angles, write clear briefs, and leverage AI tools to accelerate ideation and execution. 



A portfolio demonstrating direct-response performance wins is required.



What You’ll Do

Creative Strategy & Performance

• Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks aligned with performance goals, customer personas, and client goals.

• Write clear, creative briefs for editors/designers (ad creative briefs, UGC briefs, production briefs, VO scripts).

• Build strategic plans outlining creative direction and testing timelines.

• Advise the Growth Strategist on winning angles and creative decisions.

• Oversee deliverables from ideation ? execution ? testing ? results.

• Analyze paid media performance and turn insights into actionable creative recommendations.

• Conduct competitive intel, social media trends research, social listening

• Adjust, iterate, or sunset concepts based on data—not ego.

• Ideally, create full-funnel experiences (ad ? landing page).



Quality Control

• Sign off on all creatives before testing, ensuring they follow performance principles, brand guidelines, and contain zero typos.



Workflow & Research

• Join client meetings alongside the Growth Strategist to present learnings and next steps.

• Conduct competitive intel, trend monitoring, and social listening.

• Deeply research customer demographics and psychographics using Reddit, FB groups, comments under ads, and organic content.

• Identify natural-language patterns, sentiment, objections, and emerging angles.



Innovation & Best Practices

• Stay up to date with top creators, performance frameworks, and industry methodologies.

• Encourage and train the team in adopting new technologies and AI tools.

• Share best practices, resources, and educational opportunities with the creative team.



Hiring & Team Contribution

• Participate in hiring editors/designers.

• Review test tasks and assist in designing them.



Technical & Tool Expertise

• Edit videos quickly and at high quality using Adobe CC (alternative tools are accepted,

please let us know what you use)

• Actively use AI and process-simplification tools (e.g., VEO 3.1, 
, ElevenLabs, Arcards, ChatGPT).

• Use research tools (Atria, Foreplay, AdSpy) to identify winning formats and angles.

• Ideally, have experience working efficiently within project management systems (Asana, ClickUp, Jira, Notion, Confluence).

• Ideally, have experience managing assets through 
, 
, and stock libraries.

• Maintain and optimize tool subscriptions for the creative team.



What You Must Bring

Hard Skills

• 1.5–2+ years as a Creative Strategist or Senior Paid Media Video Editor. Additional experience providing strategy for designers or creating static deliverables is preferable.

• Proven track record of producing high-performing direct-response ads.

• Strong copywriting for paid ads, UGC scripts, and production briefs. Ideally, experience writing copy for the funnels and/or VSLs.

• Ability to storyboard for UGC and production-level shoots.

• Video editing proficiency (Adobe CC, or other tools) and ability to deliver fast, high quality iterations.

• Hands-on experience with AI creative tools.

• Familiarity with research tools, version control tools, and project management software.



Soft Skills

• Love for social media

• Clear communication

• Storytelling & persuasion

• Data-driven thinking

• Collaboration & diplomacy

• Creativity with a performance mindset

• Strong organization & time management

• Extreme attention to detail

• Proactive problem-solving

• Continuous learning & curiosity



Non-Negotiables

• Must be hands-on with editing (not only strategy).

• Must be able to produce winning ad creatives (portfolio required).

• Must demonstrate real examples of using AI tools in your workflow



To apply, fill out the application form, please do not forget to attach required portfolio.

title: Video Editor & Food Content Assistant (Cooking + Filming)
description:
???? Taguig (near Parañaque / Bicutan)

?? Must live nearby or be able to commute easily





We’re a small, creative food content team looking for a Video Editor & Food Content Assistant to help create recipe videos for social media.



This is not a typical kitchen role.



It’s a mix of:

* video editing

* cooking

* filming

* content creation





You’ll be working closely with a small team (including one other creator), learning hands-on and helping bring recipes to life on camera.



Why this role is exciting

* Your work will be seen by an audience of 1.5+ million followers

* You’ll create content around trending recipes and food ideas

* You can take home the food you make

* All ingredients are covered

* You’ll be part of a small team where your creativity matters

* Your ideas and feedback will be valued and used in recipe development

* Flexible structure with the ability to increase your earnings based on output





What you’ll be doing

* Plan ahead and purchase ingredients for assigned recipes (costs covered)

* Prepare and cook recipes by following instructions precisely

* Film the cooking process using your phone (capturing key steps and angles)

* Set up shots, angles, and sequences to match the required style

* Plate and finish dishes with a clean, visually appealing presentation

* Review footage and refilm if needed to get the best result (quality matters more than speed)

* Edit short-form videos (Reels / TikTok style)

* Upload final footage and files to Dropbox

* Clean and reset the kitchen between recipes

* Provide feedback on recipes and suggest improvements for future versions





Requirements

* Must own an iPhone 12 Pro or newer (or equivalent with high-quality camera)

* Must have video editing experience (CapCut or similar)

* Must live near Taguig / Parañaque / Bicutan area

* Must be an experienced home cook (confident following recipes independently)

* Must have strong attention to detail and precision, especially with measurements

* Able to follow recipes closely and repeat results consistently

* Comfortable working in a kitchen environment

* Not afraid of hard work (this role can be physical and involves being on your feet)

* Takes ownership of their work and cares about producing high-quality output

* Reliable and consistent

* Comfortable working in a private home kitchen (apartment setting)





Preferred (but not required)

* Experience with baking and desserts

* Experience with pastry-style finishes (e.g. neat frosting, piping, decorating baked goods)

* Good eye for food presentation and plating

* Ability to execute clean finishes (spreading, drizzling, layering)

* Strong knife skills and clean portioning

* Interest in content creation or social media

* Familiarity with vegan or plant-based cooking (bonus)





Work Setup & Pay

* Training: hands-on, paid daily rate (3 days per week)

* You’ll be trained directly within the team

* Filming is currently done in a private home kitchen with a small team

* This role requires a high level of trust, professionalism, and respect for the space





After training:

* Flexible hours (must film during good daylight for best quality footage)

* You are responsible for managing your own output



Expected output:

* Minimum 5 videos per week

* 2–3 videos per day is achievable once trained

* No upper limit on output if quality is maintained





Pay structure:

* $11 USD per basic recipe

* $14 USD per mid-level recipe

* $17 USD per complex recipe

* Small monthly retainer

* All ingredients are covered, and you keep the food you make





Who this is for



Someone who:

* enjoys the creative process

* takes pride in doing things properly

* is patient and willing to redo things to get the best result

* is detail-oriented and precise

* wants to take ownership of their work and output

* is motivated to improve and contribute ideas





To apply



Send:

* 1–2 videos you have edited or a portfolio of your work

* A photo of a finished dish you’ve made



Include the word FOODVIDEO in your application so we know you’ve read everything.

title: Sales Representative - Wholesale Distribution (USA Working Hours)
description:
We are a fast-growing wholesale distribution company supplying retail stores across the United States, and we are looking for a driven Sales Representative to help expand our customer base and grow revenue.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and motivated by performance and results.



Key Responsibilities



• Actively reach out to and follow up with potential customers

• Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients

• Identify new sales opportunities and close deals

• Coordinate customer orders and requests with our warehouse

• Track leads, conversations, and follow-ups to ensure no opportunity is missed

• Consistently work toward increasing monthly sales and revenue



Work Schedule



• 8 hours per day aligned with U.S. business hours

• Occasional availability outside standard hours or weekends may be needed to support customers



Who We’re Looking For



• Strong communication and sales skills

• Highly organized and reliable

• Self-motivated with a results-driven mindset

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Previous sales or customer-facing experience is a plus



How to Apply



Please include the word “Salesperson” in your application so we know you’ve read the full job description.

title: Sales & Customer Support – Wholesale Distribution (USA Working Hours)
description:
We are a growing wholesale distribution company supplying retail stores across the United States.



We are looking for a highly organized Virtual Assistant to manage communication between customers and our warehouse and help maintain relationships with both current and potential customers.



This role requires someone who is extremely organized and reliable, as there are many tasks, follow-ups, and customer requests that must be tracked carefully.



Responsibilities



• Follow up with potential customers

• Maintain communication with existing customers

• Coordinate customer requests with our warehouse

• Keep track of orders, requests, and follow-ups so nothing is missed



Compensation



This role includes a commission structure where our Virtual Assistants split 10% of our company’s revenue.



There is no cap on income. The harder you work and the more you help grow the business, the more you can earn.



We are looking for someone who is motivated, hardworking, and excited about the opportunity to earn more through performance.



Work Hours



• 8 hours per day during USA working hours



Because we work with U.S. customers, occasional communication outside normal hours or on weekends may be necessary.



How to Apply



Please include the word “Organized” in your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: ** Short-Form Video Editor ** (Ad Creatives & Founder Storytelling)
description:
INTRO:

Are you a creative, detail-oriented editor with a passion for visual storytelling and conversion-driven ads? Do you enjoy the challenge of translating a brand's vision into captivating short-form video content?



I’m Rico, the founder of Lampiece, where we create unique, personalized lamps. My brand is built on authenticity, a personal touch, and the journey of building a business. I am looking for a reliable, intermediate-to-advanced Video Editor to help me scale our content.



Currently, we need 1 Social Media Video and 1 Video Ad Creative per week, with the goal of increasing this output gradually as we grow.



Example of the style we're going for:

- 



WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON:

You will receive detailed editing briefs and raw footage to create two distinct types of content:

- Social Media Videos (Storytelling): Founder-led content focusing on my business journey. This requires an authentic, engaging storytelling style.

- Ad Creatives (Conversion-Driven): Direct-response ads using various formats like UGC, mashups, and founder ads.



Note on Language: The final output for all videos will be in both English and Dutch. Don't worry if you don't speak Dutch! You will be provided with clear English instructions and detailed briefs making it very easy to create the Dutch versions (including matching the subtitles).



OUR PERFECT MATCH HAS:

- 2+ years of experience editing either social media videos or ad creatives (experience in both is a major plus!).

- Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (No CapCut).

- Strong skills in making engaging basic cuts, adding dynamic subtitles, and integrating simple motion graphics.

- A keen eye for pacing, visual aesthetics, and social media platform specifications (TikTok, Instagram Reels, Shorts).

- A proactive attitude and the ability to follow a detailed creative brief.



COMPENSATION:

This is a freelance role, and you will be paid on a per-video basis. As the brand grows, your weekly volume and earning potential will grow with it.



HOW TO APPLY:

To ensure you have read this entire post, please include the word "LAMP" at the very beginning of your application subject line or message. Please send us:

- Your resume

- A link to your portfolio specifically showcasing your short-form video editing skills (please point out which are ads and which are organic social media videos).

- Bonus points: Include a brief proposal on how you'd capture our brand's authenticity and unique charm in video form.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
We are currently seeking an experienced, detail-oriented Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our amazing team! We are passionate about what we do and delight in providing excellent service that will make positive changes in the lives of those we serve.



**MUST include in your application a 2-minute video describing yourself and your experience in talent acquisition**



Position Summary: We’re seeking an experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist with outstanding people skills to join our team. As a Talent Acquisition Specialist, you’ll work to attract excellent job candidates, conduct interviews, and identify future hiring needs. This position is a remote work from home position with an occasional in-person meeting at our Huntsville office.



You’ll need a wide variety of skills to succeed as a Talent Acquisition Specialist: excellent communication skills, knowledge of social media best practices, and superb multitasking skills, among others.



Talent Acquisition Specialist Responsibilities:

- Collaborate with department managers to identify employment needs and candidate requirements

- Work with department managers to develop job descriptions

- Share job descriptions through posting on various recruitment databases, social media, and online employment forums

- Monitor applications and conduct phone screenings and interviews with suitable candidates

- Evaluate applicant knowledge and skills, along with work experience, to select the strongest candidate for the position

- Conduct background screenings as required

- Prepare employment offers, answering questions as needed, and scanning in returned paperwork

- Assist in onboarding new employees

- Promote employee retention

- Provide hiring and retention reports to management as needed

- Must have a quiet area in their home environment in speaking with candidate and conducting interviews



Skills and Abilities:

- Superior Time Management Skills

- Attention to detail

- Ability to connect with a diverse group of candidates

- Excellent Interpersonal Skills

- Excellent communication and organizational skills

- Proficient with applicant tracking software, Microsoft Office Suite, Microsoft Teams, and Phone system

- Working knowledge of employment law, both state and federal



Experience:

- [2+] years experience in Talent Acquisition/Recruitment, Preferred



Education:

- BA/BS in human resources, business, or related field, Preferred

title: Systems & Automation Specialist (Remote)
description:
Overview



We’re looking for an experienced systems-focused specialist to support the development, optimisation, and maintenance of our internal workflows and automation infrastructure.



This role sits at the intersection of operations and technology. Ideal for someone who enjoys building efficient systems, connecting tools, and improving how a business runs behind the scenes.



You’ll play a key role in ensuring that processes across client delivery, internal coordination, and data management are structured, scalable, and reliable.





Application Process



To be considered, please complete the application form below:



Applications submitted through this platform will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities



*Design, build, and optimise internal workflows across multiple business functions

*Implement and manage automations between platforms (e.g. CRM, scheduling, reporting tools)

*Maintain and improve systems used for client onboarding, service delivery, and tracking

*Troubleshoot issues and ensure tools and integrations run smoothly

*Support the structure and organisation of operational data and dashboards

*Collaborate with leadership to identify inefficiencies and implement solutions

*Document processes and maintain clear system logic for internal use



Tools & Platforms



Experience with (or similar to):



*GoHighLevel (or other CRM platforms)

*Automation tools (e.g. Make, Zapier)

*Project management tools (e.g. 
 or equivalent)

*Google Workspace (Sheets, Drive, Docs)

*Lead generation or outreach tools (e.g. Hot Prospector)



Requirements



*Proven experience working with business systems, automation, or operations infrastructure

*Strong problem-solving ability and logical thinking

*Comfortable working independently and managing priorities

*High attention to detail and process accuracy

*Ability to quickly understand and improve existing workflows





Nice to Have



*Experience in digital agencies or service-based businesses

*Exposure to call centre or service delivery workflows

*Background in process optimisation or systems design





What We Offer



*$1,000–$1,500/month (depending on experience)

*Fully remote, full-time role

*Opportunity to take ownership of systems and processes

*Direct collaboration with a fast-moving team

*Scope to grow into a senior or specialised position



If you have a strong interest in systems, automation, and improving how businesses operate, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Organic Content Manager
description:
Job description

Position Overview



We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Organic Content Manager to lead and execute our content strategy across multiple digital platforms. In this role, you will oversee social media, blog, video, and
 content operations for all our brands, ensuring high-quality, compliant, and engaging content that aligns with the firm’s marketing goals.



Responsibilities



Social Media Management



Oversee content creation and publishing for all social media platforms across brands

Coordinate with graphic designers to develop content calendars

Review and approve all content for accuracy and legal/ethical compliance

Monitor platforms and ensure timely, professional responses to comments

Actively engage with other relevant pages/accounts to grow reach and foster community

Blog Content Operations



Research trending and relevant topics in the legal industry

Assign blog topics to writers and track progress

Review, edit, and finalize blog drafts

Coordinate with web developer for timely posting

Video Content Operations



Assign video topics to attorneys or content creators

Review raw videos and coordinate with editors for revisions

Schedule and publish videos across social platforms

Ensure all video content meets brand, quality, and compliance standards

 Marketing



Create, edit, and send regular newsletters across all brands

Maintain content quality, accuracy, and alignment with broader marketing strategies

Ensure all communications meet ethical and regulatory guidelines

Qualifications



Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or related field

3+ years of experience in content marketing, social media, or digital content management

Excellent writing, editing, and communication skills

Strong understanding of brand voice, audience engagement, and ethical marketing

Proficiency with content scheduling tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer),
 platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, ConvertKit), and basic project management tools

Experience with blog platforms (e.g., WordPress) and video editing coordination preferred

Familiarity with legal marketing or professional services marketing is a plus

WHY JOIN US?



Work for one of the top-rated U.S. immigration law firms



Fully remote work environment



Be part of a mission-driven, diverse, and supportive team



Opportunities for growth and professional development



Competitive compensation and performance incentives



Job Type: Full-time

title: Photoshop & Figma Graphic Design in German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product photos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Photo Editors / Graphic Designers to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Photo Editor / Graphic Designer to edit product photos for use in Amazon and online shop listings. Your tasks will include retouching photos, as well as creating and designing graphics & icons. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the need for efficient uploads and downloads of project files.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product photos and designing graphics, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:

- Experience in photo editing and graphic design

- Good Photoshop skills

- Figma skills

- Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

- Good English skills

- Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Photo-Candidate" and include a portfolio of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



- Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

- Discipline and determination

- Eagerness to create amazing visuals and push the limits





Benefits:



- Paid time off and paid holidays

- 13th-month pay

- Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

- Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your photo editing and graphic design skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: Video Editor for High-End Branding Product Videos - Experience with AI
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality, aesthetic product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. These are not simple UGC e-commerce clips, but branding-oriented videos that elevate the perception of a product and make it stand out.



As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor with a strong sense for aesthetics and branding. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project.



Additionally, you should be capable of generating shots with AI tools and, when necessary, further enhancing or compositing them in After Effects (e.g. adding motion graphics, text overlays, visual polish).



The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.



Requirements:



• Strong experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Experience with AI-based shot generation and video enhancement

title: Creative Operations Manager - DTC
description:
Compensation: $2,000 - $2,500 USD / Month (120,
,000 PHP) + Performance Bonuses, Depending on Experience

Location: Fully remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 2:00 PM - 10:00 PM PH

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring a Creative Operations Manager for a fast-growing DTC e-commerce company selling supplements and beauty products in the African market, currently doing $2M a year with a goal of hitting $10M. This is not a purely operational role. You'll be running the day-to-day of two creative teams while also getting hands-on with the creative strategists to help them produce better, higher-converting ads. If you've worked in paid media, know what makes a winning ad, and have the discipline to keep a creative team running smoothly without being micromanaged, this role is built for you.

 

Responsibilities?

Oversee the day-to-day operations of two creative teams, each consisting of a creative strategist, video editor, and media buyer.

Work closely with creative strategists to develop better ad angles, hooks, and concepts based on performance data and market research. Monitor weekly ad performance metrics including hook rate, CTR, CPL, hold rate, and CVR, and use that data to guide the team on what to improve.

Build, document, and continuously refine SOPs and workflows to keep the creative production process running without bottlenecks.

Run weekly tea
etings to review last week's results, identify issues, and align everyone on priorities for the week ahead.

Hold each tea
mber accountable to their KPIs and output targets without micromanaging.

Create and implement performance improvement plans for underperforming tea
mbers when needed.

Identify bottlenecks in the creative workflow and fix them before they become bigger problems.

Evaluate new AI tools and stay on top of what's working in paid media to keep the team's output competitive.

Report performance and strategic recommendations to the owners, and handle day-to-day problems independently without escalating unless it's a decision above your authority.

 

Requirements

3+ years of experience in a creative operations, project management, or creative strategy role within a DTC paid media environment.

Strong understanding of paid media ad structure including hooks, CTAs, body copy, and how to evaluate what makes an ad work.

Experience managing and coaching creative teams including video editors, graphic designers, and creative strategists. Knows how to read and act on ad performance data, hook rate, CTR, CPL, hold rate, CVR, and ROAS.

Proven experience building SOPs and workflows from scratch and improving existing ones.

Experience conducting performance reviews and creating performance improvement plans.

Familiar with sprint planning and agile-style workflows for managing creative output.

Hands-on experience with project management tools like Asana, ClickUp, or similar.

Comfortable running multiple video calls per week and communicating primarily through calls and chat.

Self-directed and able to handle problems independently without needing to escalate everything to the owners.

Experience working with teams across different time zones and nationalities.

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience running ads specifically for African markets such as Kenya or Tanzania.

Background in video editing or creative strategy before moving into operations.

Familiarity with ad performance tools like Motion or Atria.

Experience with influencer or UGC marketing workflows.

Familiarity with health, wellness, or beauty DTC brands.



To Apply

title: Virtual Operations Assistant
description:
About Interceptly

Interceptly is a B2B sales automation platform helping businesses build outbound pipelines through AI-driven messaging, LinkedIn outreach, and lead management tools. We are a fast-moving team, and we are looking for a virtual operations assistant to support our day-to-day operations.





The role

You will work directly with the Interceptly team, handling a range of general admin and operational tasks. No two days will look the same. You will be supporting client communications, internal coordination, research tasks, document preparation, and anything else the team needs to keep moving.



This is a full-time remote position working some European and some US hours. We are only considering candidates for whom this will be their sole professional commitment.





What we are looking for

Solid experience as a VA or in a similar support role

Strong working knowledge of AI tools, with hands-on experience using Claude and Claude Code specifically

Comfortable using AI to complete tasks faster and better, not just as a novelty

Good written English and clear communication

Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks without constant oversight

Familiarity with tools like Slack, Airtable, or similar platforms is a plus

A reliable, high-speed internet connection and a high specification computer

A computer capable of running multiple applications and tools simultaneously without performance issues





Bonus points

Experience in or exposure to outbound marketing, sales outreach, or B2B lead generation





The AI requirement is non-negotiable

We are an AI-first team. You will be expected to use Claude and Claude Code regularly as part of your workflow. If you are not already using these tools day-to-day, this role is not the right fit.





Please do not apply if you are seeking part-time work or have other job commitments. This role requires your full attention during working hours.





What you will get

Fully remote work environment

A varied role with real responsibility

The chance to work inside a growing sales tech company





To apply

Send a short message (or a Loom video) telling us about your experience, your AI knowledge, and a short intro to yourself. Applications without this will not be considered.

, and Instagram

- Ensure CRO practices are consistently applied across platforms and flag any gaps or misalignment between teams

- Keep everyone aligned on campaign goals across social media and eCommerce platforms

- Ensure all updates, changes, campaign dates, and sales data are properly tracked and recorded

- Monitor day-to-day execution across teams and follow up on pending tasks to avoid delays

- Assist in campaign launches by ensuring all assets, links, and platforms are ready and aligned

- Double-check product listings, promotions, and website updates before and during campaigns

- Help identify gaps, bottlenecks, or missed steps in execution and flag them early

- Maintain organized trackers for tasks, campaigns, and performance data

- Ensure consistency across platforms (offers, messaging, pricing, timing)

- Support basic reporting by gathering data from Shopify, marketing channels, and other platforms

- Assist in documenting processes and keeping SOPs updated



Requirements

Experience in:

Social Media Management

Shopify or similar platforms

Meta Business Suite

TikTok Ads

Google Ads

YouTube Marketing (organic)

Klaviyo or similar



Who we’re looking for:

Organized and detail-oriented

Strong coordination and follow-up skills

Able to manage multiple platforms and teams

Proactive and reliable



Do Not Apply If:

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.

Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.

You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.

How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in spend generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.

And we offer $
fixed salary on top for anybody delivering promising work reliably.

What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds

Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.

This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow

This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output

Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.

To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

title: Remote Loss Prevention & Inventory Audit Specialist
description:
Position: Remote Retail & Wholesale Operations Review Analyst (Part-Time)

Location: Remote

Hours: 10–20 hours per week



Overview

We operate multiple retail and wholesale locations featuring high-value inventory. To support our growth and maintain operational integrity, we are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented individual to review operational data and surveillance footage.



A primary focus of this role is theft prevention and loss mitigation. You will be responsible for monitoring both retail and wholesale activities to identify discrepancies, unauthorized activity, or patterns that indicate potential loss. This is not a live monitoring position; instead, you will perform "after-the-fact" audits of data and video footage tied to specific operational events.



Responsibilities

Surveillance & Theft Prevention: Conduct regular reviews of camera footage to monitor for internal and external theft, focusing on high-value inventory handling in both retail and wholesale environments.



Inventory Auditing: Review inventory adjustments, declared waste, and discrepancies to ensure physical stock matches digital records.



Transaction Analysis: Analyze POS activity, including refunds, voids, and unusual transactions, for signs of fraud or operational error.



Operational Compliance: Cross-reference employee timekeeping records with store activity to ensure policy compliance.



Spot Audits: Perform occasional audits of warehouse and retail floor activity via surveillance to ensure standard operating procedures are followed.



Reporting: Maintain a structured log of observations. Provide brief daily summaries and a detailed weekly report highlighting notable issues or suspicious patterns.



Requirements

Uncompromising Integrity: High level of discretion and trustworthiness is mandatory.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to detect subtle patterns in data and video that indicate operational inefficiencies or potential loss.



Detail Oriented: Comfortable reviewing long-form video footage and complex operational logs.



Organized: Ability to document findings clearly and concisely for management review.



Preferred Experience

Loss Prevention: Direct experience in surveillance monitoring or retail security.



Wholesale/Warehouse Operations: Familiarity with high-volume inventory environments.



Inventory Auditing: Experience in retail operations, compliance, or investigative roles.



Hours & Compensation

Hours: Approximately 10–20 hours per week with flexible scheduling.



Compensation: $4–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience.



Important

This role involves working with sensitive operational data and security footage; strict confidentiality is a condition of employment.



To Apply: Please include a brief explanation of how you would investigate a situation where inventory is being declared as "waste" or "damaged" more frequently than expected. What specific steps would you take using both data logs and surveillance footage?

title: Telemarketer for Medical Practice
description:
About This Job:  

OptiMindHealth is a mental health and wellness counseling company. We are a group of doctors, psychologists, and clinical social workers committed to improving the psychological health and wellbeing of our patients. We are supported by a hard-working and devoted staff who help us in all aspects of practice operations. We are looking for an energetic, articulate, and highly driven telemarketer who can represent our company to current and potential clients and referral partners. This role blends high?volume outbound calling, virtual community outreach, and service promotion, all done from a remote environment. 



This position is an excellent opportunity for candidates with experience in BPO, outbound calling, sales, appointment setting, practice liaison/healthcare B2B engagement, or executive recruitment who are looking to advance their career in a meaningful and mission?driven environment. We are seeking individuals with excellent English communication skills with a clear, professional, and confident speaking voice, who can represent our practice with warmth and credibility. A Bachelor’s degree in Communications or a related field is preferred and will help you excel in this role. 



Healthcare experience is a plus, but not required. We invest in our team by providing comprehensive training, ongoing support, and the tools needed to succeed. If you are proactive, motivated, and passionate about educating and connecting with people, this role offers a rewarding opportunity to grow professionally while making a positive impact on our patients and community referral partners. 



Key Responsibilities:  

- Promote the company’s services to prospective and established clients.  

- Develop relationships to promote our services to referral sources.  

- Engage and qualify prospects through insightful, sales-focused conversations.  

- Maintain strong relationships with organizations, schools, healthcare providers, and other established referral sources.  

- Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of sales activities and make recommendations for improvement.  

- Act as a liaison between the practice and the community by being a practice service line knowledge bearer.  

- Maintain practice CRM, tracking contacts and incoming referral activity. 

- Collaborate with our Management Team to ensure consistent messaging and branding in outbound sales efforts. 



 Salary and Work Setup: 

The position is a permanent work from home arrangement, with additional details below. 

 

1. Base Salary: 45,000 PHP Monthly 

2. Commission-Based: No 

3. Payment Method: Twice Per Month 

4. Work Schedule: US Business Hours; Full-Time; 40 hours per week (No part-time) 

 

Benefits Package: 

Working at OptiMindHealth provides a stable work environment for staff members who excel and grow in their careers. Our benefits package includes: 

 

1. Government-mandated benefits (SSS, Pag-Ibig, PHIC) 

2. 13th Month Pay 

3. HMO Coverage 

4. Ten days of vacation per year 

5. Five days of sick leave allowed per year 

6. Philippine holidays observed



Include the following 2 items in your application to be considered for interview: An up-to-date CV, and a link to your sample voice recording. Your recording should be in your natural speaking voice and be at least 30 seconds in length. We require our staff to have an upbeat, positive, clear communication style and to have the ability to work closely and respectfully with a culturally diverse team.

title: Programmer (HubSpot, WordPress, Webflow) - Temp to Perm
description:
About Us

We're a growing digital agency in Atlantic Time Zone (AST) seeking a skilled programmer to cover maternity leave. This is a 3-6 month trial with potential for a permanent role.



Job Overview

Handle development in HubSpot, WordPress, and Webflow. Immediate task: Add parallax effects to a Webflow project. Must communicate effectively in English and be available during our business hours (AST) for collaboration.

Build/optimize WordPress sites.

Enhance Webflow projects (e.g., parallax effects).

Troubleshoot and deliver on time.



Requirements

Experience in HubSpot and WordPress; familiarity with Webflow.

Strong English skills.

Remote work from Philippines; availability overlapping AST business hours.

Competitive hourly pay.

Flexible remote role with growth potential.

Submit resume, portfolio, and cover letter sharing your experience/comfort level with WordPress, HubSpot, Webflow. Include your hourly rate and available times (in AST). Start your application with "golf" to confirm you've read this. Applications without these details won't be considered.
