title: Ads- Media Buyer
description:
We are seeking a results-driven Ads Media Buyer to plan, launch, manage, monitor, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple digital platforms. This role is responsible for buying media, managing budgets, testing creatives and audiences, tracking performance, and improving return on ad spend across several different companies, brands, or client accounts at the same time.



The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience across major advertising networks, understands performance marketing, and can successfully balance multiple accounts while staying organized, analytical, and proactive.



Key Responsibilities

Plan, launch, and optimize paid media campaigns across multiple advertising platforms.

Manage and monitor campaigns for several different companies, brands, or client accounts simultaneously.

Track daily performance including spend, pacing, CPA, CPL, CAC, ROAS, CTR, CPC, CPM, and conversion volume.

Allocate and adjust budgets based on campaign performance and business goals.

Develop audience targeting strategies, retargeting campaigns, lookalike audiences, and funnel-based media plans.

Conduct keyword research, competitor research, and platform testing to improve results.

Run A/B tests on creative, copy, audiences, placements, bidding strategies, and landing pages.

Build clear reports for individual accounts and cross-account performance comparisons.

Identify opportunities to scale successful campaigns and improve underperforming ones.

Troubleshoot tracking issues, pixels, conversion APIs, product feeds, and attribution problems.

Ensure each company’s campaigns align with its goals, target audience, branding, and budget.

Stay current on platform changes, ad policies, new features, and best practices across major networks.



Required Qualifications

Proven experience as a media buyer, paid ads specialist, or digital advertising manager.

Strong experience managing campaigns across multiple ad accounts, brands, or companies at once.

Deep understanding of paid media strategy, campaign structure, and performance optimization.

Ability to manage several active campaigns without missing details.

Strong analytical skills and ability to make data-driven decisions quickly.

Experience with conversion tracking, attribution, pixels, tagging, and reporting tools.

Strong organizational, time management, and communication skills.

Ability to adapt strategies across different industries, audiences, and business goals.



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with e-commerce, lead generation, or app install campaigns.

Agency or multi-client account management experience.

Familiarity with GA4, Google Tag Manager, CRM reporting, and landing page testing.

Experience with catalog ads, dynamic ads, offline conversions, and feed-based campaigns.

Understanding of programmatic, retail media, and DSP-based buying.

title: Expert Google Ads & Google Analytics Specialist (Part-Time, Growing to Full-Time)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive expert in Google Ads and Google Analytics to manage and optimize our paid search campaigns. This is a part-time role starting at 10 hours per week, with strong opportunity to scale up to more hours and potentially full-time as we grow together.



Key responsibilities include:

Setting up accurate conversion tracking

Building and managing retargeting campaigns

Monitoring multiple active campaigns across accounts

Conducting regular A/B testing to continuously improve conversion rates and ROI

Making active, regular updates and optimizations – we do NOT want someone who simply sets up a campaign and walks away



You must be proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to ongoing improvements rather than one-time setups. If you work hard, deliver consistent quality results, and show initiative, this can become a long-term, mutually beneficial relationship with opportunities to earn generous bonuses.

Important Scheduling Note:

I am located in the Atlantic time zone (approximately 12-hour time difference from the Philippines). I would need you to be available to work with me around 8 PM Philippines time for meetings, calls, or check-ins as needed.



Requirements:

Proven expertise in Google Ads and Google Analytics (certifications are a plus)

Strong track record of managing and scaling paid campaigns with measurable results

Ability to communicate clearly and professionally on voice calls and written chats in English

Reliable, self-motivated, and able to align with the scheduling needs above



To apply, please reply with:

A brief summary of your relevant experience (include specific examples of Google Ads campaigns you've managed, conversion tracking setups, retargeting work, and A/B testing results)

Your hourly rate in USD



Only serious applicants with real expertise will be considered. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Project Manager - Digital Marketing Agency
description:

Project Management & Coordination

- Coordinate across teams (developers, SEO, PPC, creatives) to ensure smooth execution

- Maintain accurate project tracking and documentation in the PM tool

Quality Assurance & Performance Marketing Delivery

- Conduct QA on websites (staging and live), including functionality, responsiveness, and link checks

Qualifications

- Experience using project management tools (e.g., ClickUp, Asana, Trello, or similar)

Nice to Have

- Background in performance marketing or technical SEO



How to Apply

Subject line: “Your Efficient Project Manager”

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

The Executive Assistant to the CEO is a high-trust, high-impact role supporting the CEO of SmarTech. This position goes beyond traditional administrative support and plays a critical role in project coordination, operational follow-through, and executive leverage. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in structured chaos, can manage priorities across multiple initiatives, and ensures that important work moves forward without friction or bottlenecks.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Maintains high accuracy across scheduling, communications, and task execution

Proactively identifies gaps, risks, and follow-ups before escalation

Keeps the CEO organized, informed, and focused on high-impact priorities

Ensures internal initiatives, projects, and partnerships move forward smoothly

Acts as a reliable execution partner in a fast-paced leadership environment





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Executive & Strategic Support

Manage calendars, meetings, and priorities for the CEO

Handle executive inbox management and draft professional communications

Prepare meeting agendas, briefs, and follow-up action items

Support organization of strategic initiatives and leadership priorities



Project Management & Operations

Own task and project coordination in Project Management tools across company initiatives

Track deadlines, dependencies, and deliverables across multiple projects

Ensure urgent and high-priority tasks are surfaced and completed on time

Follow up with internal tea
mbers and external partners to unblock work



Cross-Functional Coordination

Support coordination across operations, revenue initiatives, and partnerships

Assist with internal alignment and external communications as needed

Prepare reports, summaries, and documentation for leadership review



Sales & Growth Support

Support revenue and growth initiatives through research, preparation, and follow-up

Assist with proposal coordination, pipeline tracking, and CRM-related tasks

Ensure follow-ups and commitments tied to growth initiatives are executed



Virtual Meeting & Documentation Support

Prepare agendas and materials for internal and external meetings

Take detailed notes and document action items

Track ownership and follow-ups post-meeting



Confidentiality & Trust

Handle sensitive information with discretion and professionalism

Act as a trusted partner to the CEO and leadership team





REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

2+ years supporting senior executives or leadership teams (U.S.-based preferred)

Strong CRM and project management experience (Asana, 
, Hubspot, etc.)

Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage competing priorities

High attention to detail and consistent follow-through

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, founder-led environment





PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Background in operations, marketing, sales operations, or business support

Experience supporting CEOs, founders, or senior executives

Familiarity with MarTech, SaaS, or systems-driven businesses

Experience coordinating across internal teams and external partners





COMPENSATION

Competitive PH-based compensation, commensurate with experience - $800 - $1000

Quarterly  Performance-based incentives tied to execution quality and impact - up to $200





WHY JOIN SMARTECH

Work directly with the CEO at the center of company strategy and growth

Gain exposure to high-level decision-making and execution

Operate in a lean, impact-driven environment

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility

title: Motion Designer — Short Form Animated Content
description:

Eye for modern, fast-paced visual design

title: Part-time Adobe Illustrator Designer (Product Packaging & Labels)
description:
We are looking for a skilled Adobe Illustrator designer to join our team on a part-time, project-based basis. You will be working on product packaging and label documents — updating and refining artwork and exporting print-ready PDF files whenever we make changes to our product line, as our supplier requires .AI-files with outlining.



This is a flexible, gig-style role. There is no fixed weekly schedule — we will reach out when work is available, so you must be comfortable with an on-demand arrangement.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Edit and update existing product packaging and label designs in Adobe Illustrator

• Ensure all artwork is print-ready with correct bleeds, margins, and color profiles (CMYK)

• Export finalized files as high-quality PDFs to exact specifications (usually outlined .AI-files)

• Communicate clearly about turnaround times and flag any design issues



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

• Proven experience with Adobe Illustrator (please include portfolio or samples)

• Strong understanding of print production — bleeds, safe zones, CMYK, PDF export settings

• Experience with product packaging or label design is a big plus

• Keen eye for detail and accuracy

• Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines

• Good English communication skills



ARRANGEMENT:

• Part-time / project-based (on-demand — no guaranteed hours per week)

• Rate is negotiable depending on experience — please include your expected rate when applying

• Remote / work from home



HOW TO APPLY:

Send us a message with:

title: Meta Ads Setup Assistant (Flexible Schedule | SOP-Based | Remote)
description:
We're hiring a detail-oriented Meta Ads Setup Assistant to help us build, QC, and launch ad campaigns in Meta Ads Manager.This is a process-driven execution role, not a strategy or media buying position. All creative direction, copy, targeting, and budget decisions are made by our team. Your job is to make sure everything gets set up correctly, passes quality checks, and goes live without errors.You'll be working directly with our marketer, who will walk you through our processes during onboarding and be available for questions as you ramp up.Begin your application message with the phrase "Detail Matters" so we know you've read this posting carefully.



This role IS:



Following step-by-step processes to set up ads in Meta Ads Manager

QC-ing video creatives against a checklist before they go live (flagging issues, confirming assets meet standards)

Uploading creatives (videos and images) that are provided to you

Entering ad copy (primary text, headline, description, CTA, URL) written by someone else

Duplicating campaigns and ad sets based on specific instructions

Assisting with product launches by selecting or assembling basic image creatives for testing

Keeping creative assets and workflows organized across Google Drive and ClickUp



This role is NOT:



Creating ad strategy or choosing audiences/targeting

Making budget decisions or optimization calls

Writing ad copy or designing creatives from scratch

A media buyer or ads manager role — all strategy is handled by someone else



What we're looking for:



Hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager — real campaign builds, not just boosted posts

Extremely detail-oriented — wrong settings cost real ad dollars

Follows instructions precisely and catches errors before they go live

Asks questions proactively when something is unclear — we'd much rather answer a question than fix a mistake

Comfortable with basic image selection or assembly for product testing (Canva experience is a plus)

Reliable, communicative, and responsive during working hours

Stable internet connection with a backup plan



What we offer:



$5/hr USD

Hands-on onboarding with our marketer — you won't be thrown in without support

Flexible schedule that works with Filipino hours

Long-term opportunity for the right person — not a quick gig

Supportive team that values accuracy over speed and communication over perfection

Clear, structured work with documented processes

 groups or

mbers in the Philippines, your role becomes more important and your earnings grow with it. Strong performers will be considered for a full-time Recruitment Manager position.

Experience:

Bachelors of civil, or traffic engineering, or a related field (compensation will vary based on expertise, experience, and education)

Preferred experience in transportation engineering & design

Preferred experience in transportation safety

title: Client Account Manager - Direct Hire
description:
Location: Remote

Time-Zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)

Terms: Full-time, Independent contractor

Compensation: $7/hr, negotiable based on experience



ABOUT THE ROLE: 



We are a privately-held overseas staffing startup based in the U.S. We help top U.S. businesses (from celebrity-backed CPG firms to Y Combinator-backed AI startups) hire exceptional remote talent overseas without going through BPOs. We care deeply about providing dignified, redemptive work for people in the Philippines.



We are looking for a Client Account Manager to own the client journey from consultative sales (led by our Founder) through recruitment delivery to onboarding to retention and upsells / overall client success. This role is critical to our growth strategy: allowing our founder to focus on closing new business while you work on delivery + retention. There will be step-up opportunities to define the function, help close deals, and work cross functionally with our awesome teammates. 





ABOUT YOU:  



Are you client-focused, proactive, and process-driven? Do you enjoy building order, systems, and consistency while managing multiple stakeholders? The right person will take ownership of client delivery, anticipate challenges, and maintain high client satisfaction. You will work cross-functionally with Recruiting, Operations, and Finance to ensure a seamless, world-class experience for every client.



RESPONSIBILITIES:  



Client Onboarding & Post-Sales Delivery

- Lead client kick-off calls to align expectations, define roles, and clarify hiring needs.

- Own the client experience immediately after engagement and deposit.

- Communicate the recruitment process step-by-step, including timelines, communication cadence, and deliverables.

- Coordinate with the Recruitment team to ensure sourcing and shortlisting begin promptly.



Recruitment Process Management

- Serve as the main point of contact between clients and internal teams.

- Ensure candidate shortlists are delivered, interviews are scheduled, and feedback is collected timely.

- Follow up persistently with clients to prevent delays while maintaining a professional, friendly tone.

- Coordinate offer extensions, pre-boarding paperwork, and candidate logistics.

- Client Success & Retention



Conduct 30/60/90-day check-ins post-placement to ensure alignment and satisfaction.

- Monitor and escalate client issues before they become critical.

- Identify growth opportunities within accounts, including additional headcount or new roles.

- Oversee smooth onboarding with clients and internal operations (Miya).

- Internal Coordination & Process Improvement



Align daily with Recruitment and Operations teams on client priorities and feedback.

- Maintain accurate records in 
, Workable, and internal CRM/ATS.

- Contribute to refining client-facing SOPs and playbooks.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience in Client Account Management, Recruitment Account Management, or B2B Customer Success.

- Proven ability to manage multiple clients and processes simultaneously.

- Experience working with U.S. start ups

- Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills (native/bilingual level).

- Comfortable using CRM/ATS/Collaboration tools (Workable, 
, Slack, Zoom/Fathom).

- Ability to work full U.S. Central or Pacific time zones reliably.

- Ability to work reliably and independently in a remote setting with minimal supervision.

- Bachelor Degree or higher (summa, magna or cum laude and/or Academic Scholar from a reputable college preferred) 



Preferred Requirements 

- Experience managing recruitment pipelines in a remote staffing or BPO environment.

- Familiarity with U.S. startup culture, particularly Series B/C companies.

- Bonus: Experience with ATS or CRM integrations, scaling client delivery processes.



To Apply send your resume and a short introduction
 to: 

Subject: Your Name – Applicant for Client Account Manager

Example: Maria Santos – Applicant for Client Account Manager



Please submit your application to the
. DMs are not monitored.

title: Operations Manager – Solar Leasing
description:
About the Company



We are a newly launching renewable energy company focused on prepaid solar lease programs for homeowners across the United States. Our goal is to simplify solar ownership by offering an easy, affordable prepaid lease option while delivering a world-class customer experience.



The founders have built successful companies in the solar and home services industries, generating millions in annual revenue, and are now launching a new platform focused specifically on solar leasing and financing programs.



We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager to help build and manage the operational systems of the company as we grow.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building processes, managing projects, and keeping operations running smoothly in a fast-moving startup environment.



Position Overview



The Operations Manager will oversee the day-to-day operational processes of the company including solar lease onboarding, project coordination, documentation, and internal workflow management.



This person will work closely with leadership and sales teams to ensure that projects move efficiently from sale to installation and activation.



The ideal candidate has experience supporting solar companies, solar leasing programs, or solar project coordination, and is comfortable managing multiple processes at once.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations & Workflow Management:

Manage day-to-day operational processes for solar lease projects

Build and maintain internal workflows for onboarding and project tracking

Coordinate between sales, finance partners, and installation teams

Ensure projects move efficiently from sale ? approval ? install ? activation



Solar Lease Processing:

Assist with processing solar lease applications and documentation

Coordinate credit approvals and lease agreements

Maintain records and ensure compliance with required documentation

Track project milestones and funding timelines



Project Coordination:

Coordinate installation scheduling with installers and vendors

Ensure customers receive clear communication throughout the process

Track timelines and escalate delays when needed



Systems & Process Development:

Help build operational SOPs and internal procedures

Improve efficiency of workflows as the company scales

Implement tools and systems to track projects and tasks



Team Coordination:

Work with leadership to help build the operations team over time

Assist with training new operations staff as the company grows



Qualifications



Required

2+ years experience in solar operations, solar leasing, or solar project coordination

Strong organizational and project management skills

Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

Experience working remotely with U.S.-based teams

Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines



Preferred

Experience with solar finance or solar lease programs

Familiarity with solar CRM or project management systems

Experience supporting installation scheduling and project workflows



Tools You May Work With

CRM systems

Solar proposal platforms

Dealer finance portals

Google Workspace

Slack or similar communication tools

Project management software



Compensation:

$
/week, $1,000-$1,7000/month (depending on experience)

Paid weekly

Performance-based bonuses

Long-term growth opportunities as the company expands



Why Join Us

Be part of a startup in a rapidly growing solar finance market

Opportunity to help build the operational foundation of the company

Fully remote work environment

Work directly with experienced founders in the solar industry



How to Apply



Please submit:

Resume

title: Brand Manager, Personal Brand (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Company: Ryan Rivard / BSPKN

Location: Remote, Philippines (metro area strongly preferred)

Type: Full-Time, dedicated to personal brand operations

Compensation: TBD on experience (below) | Experienced level (High)

Start Date: Immediate, with 2-week paid trial period



About Ryan Rivard

Ryan Rivard is an executive coach, endurance athlete, and content creator with 226,000 Instagram followers and a growing TikTok audience of 14,000. He summited Mount Everest in May 2024, completed Ironman Madison and the Leadville 100 MTB, and coaches high-performing founders and executives through The Dodek Method. Ryan partners with leading performance, recovery, and wellness brands including Ten Thousand, Omorpho, Fjord Cold Plunge, Dottir, Icon Meals, and others. His personal brand generates over 332,000 organic views per month and is actively scaling its brand partnership revenue.



The Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented, organized, and proactive Brand Manager to run the day-to-day operations of Ryan's personal brand. This is not a generic virtual assistant role. You will be the operational backbone of a growing personal brand and content business. You will manage Instagram, coordinate with brand partners, organize content assets, track deliverables, send invoices, and ensure everything runs smoothly so Ryan can focus on filming and closing partnerships.

This role is ideal for someone who takes pride in building something meaningful, is genuinely excited about the fitness, wellness, and endurance space, and wants to grow alongside a brand that is scaling rapidly.



Responsibilities

Manage and post content to Ryan's Instagram account (Reels, Stories, static posts, carousels) on a consistent schedule using provided content calendars and brand guidelines.



Research trending Reels, audio, and content formats. Identify opportunities to repurpose existing footage into new content. When Ryan sends a Reel he likes, adapt it for his brand and audience.



Communicate with brand partners in dedicated Slack channels. Track what has been delivered to each brand, what is outstanding, and what is coming up.



Send invoices to brand partners on schedule. Track payments received and flag overdue accounts.

Organize the B-roll folder system in Google Drive. When Ryan or his family uploads raw footage, sort it into the correct category (Running, Cycling, Gym, Family, Events, etc.).



Manage affiliate links and tracking codes for brand partnerships. Ensure correct links are used in bios, captions, and Stories.

Conduct outreach to potential brand partners using provided templates and the media kit. Warm up leads before Ryan engages directly.



Maintain the content strategy folder including brand voice document, social typography, mood board, and brand kit.

Provide weekly status updates covering content posted, brand deliverables completed, invoices sent, engagement highlights, and upcoming deadlines.



Requirements

Minimum 1 year of experience managing social media for a personal brand, influencer, or content creator (not just a business page).

Strong understanding of Instagram including Reels, Stories, engagement strategy, hashtag research, and posting timing.

Proficiency with Canva for basic graphic creation and content formatting.

Experience with Google Drive, Slack, and basic project management tools.

Excellent written English. You will be writing captions, responding to brand partners, and drafting outreach messages.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive. You do not wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you do it.



Available during US Central Time with a minimum of 3 to 4 hours of overlap per day.



Preferred but Not Required

Experience in fitness, wellness, endurance, or lifestyle brand content.

Familiarity with influencer marketing, brand partnerships, white-listing, and UGC content.

Experience with TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or cross-platform content.

Basic understanding of paid media metrics such as impressions, click-through rate, and ROAS.



Tools You Will Use

Instagram Creator Studio and Meta Business Suite. Slack. Google Drive. Canva. Invoicing software (Stripe or QuickBooks). AI tools, including Claude.ai, Higgsfield, Heygen and/or Popy AI



What Success Looks Like

30 days: Instagram posting is consistent, the B-roll folder is organized, and you are managing at least 2 brand partner Slack channels independently.

60 days: You are proactively researching content ideas, managing all invoicing, and Ryan is spending less than 30 minutes per day on brand admin.

90 days: You are conducting warm outreach to new brand partners, managing 4 to 6 active brand relationships, and the content pipeline runs without daily direction from Ryan.



How to Apply

Submit the following with your application.

Your resume or portfolio showing social media management experience.

A brief paragraph of 3 to 5 sentences explaining why you are a good fit and what excites you about working with a personal brand in the fitness and coaching space.

A link to one Instagram account you currently manage or have managed, with permission to share.

A 60-second video introduction of yourself via Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube unlisted. Show us one Instagram account you manage, walk us through one post you are proud of, and tell us why it performed well. This is required.



IMPORTANT: To confirm you have read this entire job description, please title your application "morning summit." Applications without this exact title will not be reviewed.

title: Case Manager
description:
Ward Ruddock is a personal injury and insurance litigation firm based in Miami, Florida. We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Case Manager to handle personal injury cases during the pre-suit phase. This role requires someone who can take ownership of cases, manage deadlines, communicate effectively, and ensure that each file progresses efficiently from intake through demand and potential settlement.



This is not an entry-level or basic administrative role. You will be responsible for actively managing cases, coordinating treatment, tracking documentation, and preparing files for demand.



The primary responsibilities of this role include managing case intake and setup by gathering all necessary client documentation, opening insurance claims, obtaining claim numbers, sending letters of representation, and requesting police reports and initial medical records. You will be responsible for maintaining consistent communication with clients, including biweekly check-ins, ensuring that clients are treating appropriately, and coordinating medical appointments as needed. You will track treatment progress and ensure that all relevant medical documentation is obtained.



You will also be responsible for requesting, organizing, and maintaining all medical records and billing, tracking liens and insurance information, and ensuring that case files are complete and organized at all times. A critical part of this role includes assisting in the preparation of demand packages, which must be completed promptly once treatment concludes. This includes compiling all supporting documentation, preparing summaries, and coordinating with the attorney prior to submission.



You will submit demands, confirm receipt with adjusters, track offers and communications, and assist in coordinating settlement documentation when cases resolve. If a case does not resolve in the pre-suit phase, you will assist in preparing the file for transition to litigation.



Performance expectations include completing intake within five days of assignment, requesting medical records within 48 hours, maintaining consistent communication with clients, and preparing demand packages promptly after treatment concludes. You must be able to manage multiple cases at once and keep them progressing without constant supervision.



Candidates must have prior experience as a personal injury case manager. Familiarity with insurance claims, medical records, and pre-suit case handling is required. Excellent written and spoken English is required, along with strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently. Experience with case management software such as Clio is preferred, along with proficiency in Google Workspace or Microsoft Office.



This is a remote position. Full-time availability is preferred, and candidates must have some overlap with U.S. Eastern Time working hours. Compensation will be based on experience and skill level, with opportunities for long-term growth within the firm.



To apply, please submit your resume and a brief description of your experience handling personal injury cases. In addition, answer the following question: Walk me through how you would handle a personal injury case from intake through demand. At the top of your application, include the phrase “Case Manager – Ward Ruddock.”



We are looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, follows up without being asked, communicates clearly, and maintains a high level of organization and accountability.

title: Ghostwriter for Dark Dystopian Sci-Fi Side Novels (Remote)
description:
Project Overview

We are looking for a talented, reliable ghostwriter to write side novels and novellas set in an original dark dystopian sci-fi universe. The main series follows a secret ancient Order of warriors who carry trauma as power while fighting a global oligarchy known as the Partners. The side stories will expand on characters, lore, historical events, and subplots (e.g., gladiator-style arenas, training rituals, individual recruit backstories, and the looming war). All work must be written in a gritty, cinematic, emotionally raw style with strong character development and psychological depth.

Key Requirements

•  Perfect command of standard modern American English — native-level fluency in grammar, rhythm, dialogue, and prose.

•  Deep familiarity with current North American culture, including movies, music, television, slang, humor, and social rhythms (2020s–2030s vibe).

•  Strong experience writing fiction, particularly science fiction or dark dystopian genres.

•  Genuine love for science fiction and dystopian storytelling — you should be excited about building immersive worlds, morally complex characters, and high-stakes emotional drama.

•  Excellent work ethic — self-motivated, deadline-driven, and able to deliver high-quality work consistently with minimal supervision.

•  Ability to write dark, violent, psychologically intense scenes while maintaining emotional authenticity and character depth.

•  Strong storytelling skills with a focus on character arcs, trauma, world-building, and thematic resonance.

•  Comfort with receiving detailed feedback and making revisions quickly.

•  Strict confidentiality and professionalism (NDA required).

•  Reliable internet connection and excellent written communication skills for regular collaboration across time zones.

What You’ll Be Doing

•  Writing 10-90 page side novels and shorter novellas that expand the main universe.

•  Working from detailed outlines, character profiles, and lore bibles provided by the author.

•  Capturing a consistent dark, cinematic tone that feels like a blend of Blade Runner, Dune, and The Last Kingdom.

•  Delivering clean, publication-ready manuscripts on schedule.



 First month offering 2-3 hours a week to gauge our fit and your work. If things click, willing to up hours to 5 a week or more plus bonus



Special Notes



3 hours per week to start.

title: MCA Sales Advisor
description:

Your primary role will be to call up prospective businesses from the given leads and qualify the business based on their deposits and what amount they're looking for. Once qualified, you will walk them through the application to fill out. Once filled out your job with that prospect is complete and one of our relationship managers will take over. 



We will provide you with the scripts, training material, and leads.



Ideal Requirements:



- Would like someone familiar with merchant cash advance and the business financing space  

- familiarity with using hub spot 

- cold calling experience 



This role involves a base and commission per submitted and funded application so there's great earning potential.



IMPORTANT: If interested please send a 30 second video detailing your experience

Videos are typically 12–15 minutes long, and I will provide:

Script

Voiceover

Images

Background music

Clean editing and pacing

$30–35 USD per English video (12–15 min)

+$10 USD per additional language



Each project usually includes:

English version

3 translated versions

Total per project: $60–65 USD



???? About Translations:

Translations are fairly easy work:

Script + voiceover are fully provided

You mainly adjust timing and text to match the new voiceover



Style:

Clean and professional

Strong pacing (VERY important)

Engaging but not over-edited

Focus on retention

You will follow brand guidelines, but you’re encouraged to be creative within that style.



Workflow:

Around 1 video per week

Potential for more if things go well

Deadline: within 48 hours per video



I’m looking for someone who:

Has experience editing YouTube videos

Understands pacing and viewer retention

Is fluent in English

Is reliable and meets deadlines

Can source relevant clips and visuals

Also include:

title: Creative, Playful UGC Video Editor
description:
Agency: Ostrich — US-based UGC Ad Agency

Start Date: ASAP

Location: Remote (must be available 2 days/week on UK time)



Are you the kind of video editor who notices the little things? Do you love turning raw, personality-packed footage into scroll-stopping content that feels native to TikTok and Instagram? If you’re playful, creatively obsessive, and deeply tuned into current UGC trends, we want you on our team.



Ostrich is a fast-growing ad agency that specializes in User Generated Content (UGC) for paid social. We create engaging, authentic-feeling video ads for a wide range of brands. Think lo-fi, high-converting, human-first content that blends seamlessly into social feeds.



We're looking for a full-time UGC Video Editor who gets the vibe. That means:

???? Not overproduced.

???? No stock footage.

???? Just clever editing, relatable 
nts, and platform-native creativity.



???? What You’ll Be Doing:

- Editing 50–100 short-form videos/month (30–90 seconds each) using creator-shot raw footage

- Adding playful overlays, punchy captions, and smart cuts that mirror platform trends

- Collaborating closely with a creative lead based in the UK (2 days/week overlap required)

- Making fast, thoughtful revisions based on feedback

- Staying current on TikTok/IG trends, audio 
s, and native transitions



???? You’re a Great Fit If You:

- Are a wizard in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Speak and write excellent English

- Are obsessed with details, captions, and clever pacing

- Know how to use in-camera transitions like snaps, covers, and taps (and splice them cleanly)

- Never rely on stock footage

- Love being part of a collaborative, feedback-driven creative process

- Follow UGC creators and brands just for fun

- Have a knack for solving little editing problems before they become big ones



???? What We Want to See From You:

- Your best UGC-style edits only (no reels with stock footage, motion graphics templates, or polished brand films)

- Bonus points for examples using TikTok-native transitions (spliced, not effects-added)

- Any videos where your editing made the content funnier, clearer, or more relatable



Examples of the type of work we do:

????

title: Marketing & Business Development Executive
description:
JOB TYPE: Full-Time



JOB SUMMARY



We are looking for a proactive and results-driven Marketing & Business Development Executive to support our US-based clients, primarily in the home care industry. This role focuses on lead generation, cold outreach,
 communication, and relationship building.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable working in a client-facing role, engaging with prospects through calls and
s, and consistently driving new business opportunities through structured outreach and follow-ups. Experience with CRM tools is preferred, but the primary focus is on traditional marketing and business development efforts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Generate new business opportunities through cold calling,
 outreach, and prospecting

Build and maintain strong relationships with prospects, clients, and referral partners

Conduct regular follow-ups to nurture leads and move them through the pipeline

Communicate professionally with US-based clients via phone,
, and virtual meetings

Understand client requirements and align outreach strategies accordingly

Prepare and share presentations, proposals, and outreach messages when required

Identify potential partnerships and referral sources to drive consistent lead flow

Maintain accurate records of leads, interactions, and follow-ups using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

Track daily/weekly outreach activities and report progress to internal teams

Collaborate with internal teams to support client requirements and business growth initiatives



REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field

2–5 years of experience in marketing, lead generation, or business development roles

Proven experience in cold calling,
 outreach, and lead generation

Experience working with US-based clients or international clients

Strong verbal and written English communication skills

Ability to handle client conversations confidently and professionally

Experience using CRM tools (Salesforce, Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

Strong follow-up, persuasion, and relationship-building skills

Good organizational and time-management abilities in a remote setup



PREFERRED SKILLS



Experience in home care, healthcare, or service-based industries

Familiarity with
 marketing tools or outreach platforms

Basic understanding of marketing automation tools

Ability to prepare presentations and reports (PowerPoint/Google Slides)



WORK DETAILS



Remote Role (Philippines-based candidates preferred)

Must be comfortable working in US time zones

Full-time position



WHY JOIN US:

Opportunity to work on US-focused marketing initiatives 

Hands-on exposure to advanced AI marketing and CRM tools 

Collaborative, growth-oriented work environment 

Direct client interaction and ownership of marketing outcomes



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important):

Attach your updated resume

Subject line must be formatted exactly as: Last Name, First Name – Marketing Executive

Only 10 application points will be accepted

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be disregarded

title: Part-Time Accounting Support - AP & Bookkeeping (Remote)
description:
We are a growing organization looking for an experienced accounting professional to join our team part-time. This is a remote role — 4 hours per day — supporting our finance operations with a focus on Tipalti integration and general bookkeeping.



What You'll Do:

- Support the setup, management, and day-to-day use of our Tipalti accounts payable platform

- Process and manage vendor payments, bills, and AP workflows

- Perform monthly bookkeeping and account reconciliations

- Assist with financial record-keeping and reporting as needed

- Communicate clearly with our internal team on any discrepancies or issues



What We're Looking For:

- Solid accounting or bookkeeping background — this is not an entry-level role

- Hands-on experience with accounts payable (AP) processes

- Experience with Tipalti is a strong plus (please highlight this in your application)

- Proficiency with NetSuite is highly preferred; experience with other accounting software (QuickBooks, Xero, or similar) will also be considered

- Detail-oriented, organized, and dependable



Role Details:

- Part-time: 4 hours/day, Monday–Friday

- Fully remote, flexible scheduling within US business hours

- Pay: $650–$800/month USD depending on experience



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and a brief note about your accounting experience, any Tipalti exposure, and why you're interested in this role. Applications without this information will not be considered.
